apiJob.title: Manager, APAC Music SupervisionAudioEntertainmentShanghai, China
apiJob.description:
AudioManager, APAC Music SupervisionShanghai, ChinaAdditional Locations: SingaporeJob Id: REQ-0009405In 2009, Riot released its debut game League of Legends and has since gone on to become the most-played PC game in the world, spawning a rich entertainment ecosystem including more games, music, film and TV, and consumer products. Riot’s second title, VALORANT, has become another global success -and now, the new frontier is commercial live events, centered on our characters, games, IP, and music universe. We’re looking for humble but ambitious, razor-sharp professionals who can bring a fresh perspective to RGM. Like us, you take play seriously-you’re passionate about games. We embrace those who see things differently, aren’t afraid to experiment, and have a healthy understanding of how to work within constraints. That’s where you come in. As Manager, APAC Music Supervision, you’ll lead Riot Games Music’s supervision efforts across our portfolio of games and content in the APAC region - including League of Legends, Wild Rift, VALORANT, Teamfight Tactics, 2XKO, and others. You’ll guide the execution of regional music strategies, leading a mix of internal and external contributors, and representing RGM across Riot’s publishing and product teams in East Asia and Southeast Asia. This is a people manager role reporting to Riot Games Music’s Lead Music Supervisor. You’ll be responsible for growing craft excellence in music supervision while building operational bridges across game, entertainment, and publishing teams in APAC. You’ll also serve as a key interface with our Chinese publishing partners at Tencent and K6, helping guide joint planning, regional artist collaborations, and campaign execution. Responsibilities: Manage and grow Riot’s music supervision presence across APAC, overseeing execution for music strategies on League of Legends, Wild Rift, VALORANT, 2XKO, and other Riot titles. Act as a regional lead and day-to-day music partner to Riot product and publishing teams across China, Japan, Korea, and Southeast Asia. Lead creative development and execution of original score, licensed music, and artist collaborations that reflect regional cultural context and player identity. Build, guide, and mentor a team of music supervision contributors (internal and external) in the region. Collaborate cross-functionally with audio, creative, marketing, and game teams to align music with campaign goals and player experience. Partner with Tencent and K6 teams in China to support music strategy, campaign approvals, and localization of music-forward assets. Partner with RGM project managers, team coordinators, and Business Affairs to ensure regional music workstreams align with Riot Games Music’s operational standards for rights, budgeting, and production workflows. Track music KPIs in APAC markets and iterate on creative and partnership strategy based on performance insights. Cultivate and maintain a strong network of regional composers, artists, producers, and music agencies. Represent the APAC music supervision POV in global RGM sync meetings, project reviews, and best practice sharing. Manage a small team of early career creatives, consultants and coordinators based in the APAC region, mentoring them both in the craft of music supervision and executive development Required Qualifications: 5+ years of experience in music supervision, music production, or A&R across games, entertainment, or media, with at least 1-2 years in a team leadership or people management capacity. Strong understanding of music and culture in East and Southeast Asia, and demonstrated ability to lead music strategy for culturally diverse audiences. Experience leading or mentoring other music professionals or cross-functional project teams. Familiarity with music licensing, rights negotiation, and working with legal/business affairs stakeholders. Track record of managing multiple music campaigns or initiatives simultaneously. Excellent communication and collaboration skills across creative, technical, and executive audiences. Fluent in English and Mandarin (verbal & written). Korean or Japanese is a strong plus. Familiarity with Western workplace tools such as Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides), Slack, DISCO, and Airtable. Desired Qualifications: Experience working with or alongside Tencent or K6 publishing teams. Previous experience working at a games publisher or developer, particularly in music, marketing, or campaign development. Hands-on background in music production, songwriting, or performance. Deep fandom or working knowledge of Riot IPs and their cultural/music identities. Apply

Software Engineering GroupManager, Software Engineering - Content Access PlatformLos Angeles, USAJob Id: REQ-0009126Riot engineers bring deep knowledge of specific technical areas but also value the opportunity to work in a variety of broader domains. As an Engineering Manager, you’ll guide an engineering team through all the phases of the software development and operations lifecycle. You’ll also serve as a people manager, mentor, and coach for the engineers, overseeing performance management, growth opportunities, and accountability. The Content Access Platform (CAP) team runs large-scale, globally distributed systems for millions of players. CAP creates the systems that power the purchasing and fulfillment experiences that all of Riot's players use. Custom catalogs for virtual goods, a full featured gifting system, and a robust, multi-stage fulfillment pipeline are only a few of the mission critical services the team builds and operates. Your passion and relentless drive to deliver players value will help us unlock and power new experiences that delight our players. As a Software Engineering Manager within the CAP group of teams, you will lead the engineering team that builds and operates the services that enable game teams to successfully ship their content to players. You will partner with the teams that create every Riot game, central technology teams, and teams in Tencent to ensure we are making excellent decisions, upholding a high quality bar, and operating efficiently in service of those players. You will report to the Senior Software Engineering Manager for the Content Access Platform group of teams. apiJob.description:
AudioManager, Sound Design - League of LegendsSingaporeJob Id: REQ-0008922Established in 2020, Riot Singapore is a game development studio focused on delivering great experiences to our players. We partner with our LA headquarters on game development for League of Legends, Teamfight Tactics, Legends of Runeterra, VALORANT and 2XKO. Riot Singapore is seeking talented, passionate Rioters with backgrounds in all areas of game development to build games that make it better to be a player. We’re focused on working together to promote individual autonomy, ownership, collaboration, and inclusivity, so every Rioter can be their best while we boldly pursue games. That's where you come in. As a Manager, Sound Design for the League of Legends team, you will be directly responsible for the production of high quality audio content of multiple products. Your consistent high standards and attention to detail will ensure that the content your team produces meets the very high expectations of our players. You’ll manage a high performing remote team, and using your broad knowledge of the creativity, craft and tech of games production, support and direct them through the process of making awesome stuff. Responsibilities: Lead and oversee the creative and technical quality of audio content for League of Legends PC, ensuring it is compelling, high-quality, and bug-free Collaborate closely with Rioters across teams, regions & disciplines to align audio goals with broader product initiatives, stakeholder needs, and efficient production practices Guide the ideation, conception, design, and implementation of sound design, voice-over, and music that supports and enhances gameplay and aligns with product goals Manage a remote, multidisciplinary team of world-class audio professionals by sourcing AAA talent, providing mentorship, and developing their craft through training and feedback Set and uphold the bar for audio excellence, reviewing deliverables, directing day-to-day activities, and ensuring alignment with the game's vision and evolving player expectations Create and execute audio plans and proposals for new features or major content, including timelines, resource needs, quality targets, and delivery milestones Design, record (studio and field), edit, and implement sound effects for characters, environments, and features using industry-standard tools, techniques, and middleware Drive the creative use of sound and VO to support gameplay clarity, narrative goals, and esports integrity Manage outsourced audio content partners and remote team members, ensuring timely delivery and integration of high-quality assets Operate autonomously when needed, proactively solving complex challenges with creative and efficient solutions. Required Qualifications: 5+ years experience developing sound for game, or shipped multiple AAA titles Expertise in the holistic game audio process (Sound Design, Voice Over, Music Implementation, Technology, Player Experience, etc.) Expertise in game engine technical implementation and Wwise audio middleware. Experience with sound design creation tools (DAW, Izotope, Waves, Melda, Native Instruments, etc) and techniques Experience in setting up sound studios, audio hardware, and software setup Experience with voice over processing tools and techniques Experience giving thorough direction and delivering timely, clear feedback A strong communicator and able to convey abstract/sophisticated ideas in a concise way, in English or in Mandarin Desired Qualifications: Proven experience leading/mentoring teams and individuals Growth minded and motivated towards teaching, enabling, and coaching other sound designers Familiarity with League of Legends - the game, it’s characters, its products, its players and community Experience teaching audio, on-line or in person Experience with Reaktor and synthesizers Experience with interactive music editing & implementation Experience with Scripting languages such as LUA Experience with Audio programming, creating audio efficiency tools Wwise certification Mandarin speaker For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise, a collaborative spirit, and decision-making that prioritizes the delight of players. We will be looking at your past studies, experience, and your personal relationship with games. If you embody player empathy and care about players' experiences, this could be your role! apiJob.description:
DesignPrincipal UX Writer - RiftboundMercer Island, USAJob Id: REQ-0009652As a UX Writer, you’ll shape the player experience across one of our games - from text and tutorials to UI and packaging. Your job isn’t to balance mechanics; it’s to design understanding. You’ll collaborate with designers, producers, and narrative partners to make sure every piece of text feels intuitive, purposeful, and alive in the world of League of Legends. At a high level, this role blends strategic systems thinking and hands-on craft. You’ll define content standards, build editorial systems, and influence game design decisions through clarity, usability, and tone As a Principal UX Writer on Riftbound, you'll help the team scale processes, strengthen voice, and build sustainable ways to keep Riftbound’s world coherent as it grows. You’ll apply UX writing and content design principles to a unique medium - helping transform deep game mechanics into accessible, engaging player experiences. Your work will set the tone and shape how Riftbound communicates, feels, and teaches. This is a hands-on, self-directed role. You’ll manage your own writing pipeline, estimate timelines, track revisions, and coordinate with producers to stay aligned with the release schedule. You won’t manage people, but you’ll manage the process: ensuring nothing slips through cracks and every line meets the clarity and quality standards players deserve. You will report directly to the Game Director. Responsibilities: Write and edit player-facing text, including card names, abilities, tutorials, and in-game UI Collaborate closely with designers to make sure text supports gameplay intent and is easy for players to grasp. You’ll balance clarity and flavor, ensuring every line is both easy to understand and rich with worldbuilding. Define standards and voice - building and maintaining Riftbound’s editorial systems: terminology rules, templates, and voice guidelines , while creating framework that will help everyone, from designers to localization partners, speaking in one consistent, accessible tone Partner with designers to simplify mechanics or adjust copy when complexity risks confusing the player. Collaborate cross-functionally and work closely with design, production, and localization partners to bring language into the development process early. Join playtests, review flows, and offer language insights that make the product more intuitive Build scalable content systems establishing processes for reviewing, documenting, and evolving game text so Riftbound’s world remains clear, cohesive, and future-proof. Manage the content pipeline - helping to scope writing work, align with production on timelines, and prioritize milestones. Brief, edit, and integrate their work to maintain tone and clarity from external writers Flex as cards evolve or new features appear and find smart, concise language solutions under deadlines without losing quality. Model UX writing best practices, collaborate closely with design partners, and advocate for clear, player-first communication across the Riftbound team, helping the team think about writing as design, not decoration. Required Qualifications: 6–10+ years of professional experience in UX writing or editorial roles—ideally with exposure to systems-based content such as games, apps, or other interactive products. Experience owning end-to-end content pipelines - from guidelines to launch. Experience designing content systems. Experience working on TCGs or equivalent genres of game development. Desired Qualifications: Ability to translate complexity into simplicity without losing flavor. Deep experience working cross-functionally with design, production, and art partners. Ability to explain content decisions clearly and give or receive feedback with empathy. Experience with interactive systems. Familiarity with League of Legends For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise and a collaborative spirit that prioritizes the delight of players. apiJob.title: Senior Manager, Brand Management – League of Legends: Wild Rift
apiJob.description:
Brand ManagementSenior Manager, Brand Management – League of Legends: Wild RiftShanghai, ChinaJob Id: REQ-0009763Riot Games was founded in 2006 by a group of passionate gamers who believed that player-focused development could create truly exceptional games. In 2009, we released League of Legends to critical and global acclaim. Today, it remains one of the world’s most-played games, with millions of players engaging each month. Players are the foundation of everything we do, and it’s for them that we continue to challenge ourselves, evolve our craft, and push the boundaries of what great experiences can look like. Brand Management at Riot exists to earn and protect player trust, inspire curiosity and interest, and help define the meaning behind our games and experiences. We believe a strong brand connects deeply with players, tells an authentic story, and leads them toward memorable experiences. As the Sr. Manager, Brand Management for League of Legends: Wild Rift, you will own the end-to-end brand narrative and holistic global brand & product marketing strategy for Wild Rift. You’ll develop a deep understanding of current players and future audiences across an ever-evolving competitive and cultural landscape. You will lead a talented team of brand managers to create bold, culturally resonant, and player-centered integrated experiences—experiences that capture imagination, fuel long-term engagement, and expand Wild Rift’s global footprint. This role is both highly strategic and hands-on. You will operate at senior altitudes while maintaining the curiosity, analytical rigor, and adaptability needed to continuously optimize campaign craft and player engagement. You are a collaborative leader who thrives in ambiguity, a mentor who invests in people’s growth, and a connector who brings teams together to achieve outcomes no single discipline can achieve alone. In this Shanghai-based role, you will also work closely with regional publishing teams and Tencent partners to align on strategy, strengthen market presence, and ensure Wild Rift’s brand evolves meaningfully across diverse global audiences. Responsibilities: Leadership & Team Development Build, guide, and inspire a high-performing brand management team that drives sustainable player growth and champions excellence in brand craft. Mentor and support career development for team members while ensuring work quality meets world-class expectations and discipline standards. Foster a team culture rooted in Riot’s values—player empathy, craft mastery, curiosity, and respect for diverse perspectives. Brand Strategy & Vision In partnership with Game Leadership, evolve and articulate a differentiated global brand strategy for Wild Rift across multiple platforms. Drive long-term brand vision, objectives, and roadmapping, ensuring coherence between brand ambition and player needs. Lead the development of culturally relevant narratives that resonate across global markets and inspire players and partners alike. Integrated Product Marketing & Campaign Excellence Own campaign strategy, player journeys, and marketing frameworks for all global Wild Rift beats—including engagement, player sentiment, awareness, consideration, and acquisition. Leverage insights, experimentation, and continuous optimization to elevate campaign craft and performance. Champion cross-disciplinary collaboration with Game Development, Publishing, and Shared Services teams to deliver innovative, high-quality, and integrated player experiences. Global Publishing & Regional Partnership Provide strategic guidance and oversight to regional publishing teams to ensure brand cohesion and impactful local executions across the globe. Serve as the accountable leader for day-to-day partnership with Tencent (K6) as the publisher of Wild Rift in China—including alignment on brand strategy, partnership management, community communication, and cross-team coordination. Elevate the team’s ability to integrate insights, cultural analysis, and player feedback into strategies and creative development. Advocate for player-first decision-making and cohesive storytelling across all touchpoints. apiJob.title: Senior Manager, Global Music Marketing & PartnershipsEntertainmentRiot Operations & SupportLos Angeles, USA
apiJob.description:
EntertainmentSenior Manager, Global Music Marketing & PartnershipsLos Angeles, USAJob Id: REQ-0009706As Senior Manager, Music Marketing & Partnerships, reporting to the Director of Label Affairs you will play a key leadership role in overseeing the partnership, distribution and promotion strategy for Riot’s music efforts. Collaborating with Music Supervision, artist and label partners, global music distributors, and internal Riot teams, you will ensure seamless execution of music initiatives that support the overall goals of Riot’s Games. You will lead music promotion and high-impact campaigns aligned with game objectives, while also driving Riot Games Music (RGM)’s overall music marketing strategy. This includes advising the creative, legal and Business Affairs teams, developing strategy and marketing plans, managing budget allocations, and coordinating vendors, consultants, and global resources across all music releases. Your team will set goals for music promotion, build partnerships with artists, and oversee music distribution, promotion, analytics, catalog management, and future repertoire planning. Additionally, you will serve as a key strategic thought partner for Games and Entertainment Publishing, ensuring that music marketing efforts are integrated to support the goals of each game pillar, acting as the critical link between music and Riot’s broader business objectives. Responsibilities: Lead the promotion and commercial exploitation efforts for all of Riot’s owned catalog - from game scores, film/TV soundtracks and artist or IP led songs Lead global artist marketing partnerships, music distribution, and promotion strategies across all RGM releases Develop novel strategies promote Riot’s IP via music and leverage fandom of Riot’s music to support game’s goals Develop and execute global music marketing plans for priority releases in partnership with Music Supervision, Game Leadership Teams, Entertainment Marketing, and regional teams. Strengthen DSP relationships, pitch new records for playlisting, and explore broader platform partnership opportunities for our past catalog Manage label and artist relationships, ensuring proper integration of music needs and supporting artist involvement in campaigns. Produce and distribute analytical reports to inform creative and business decisions, optimizing music strategies. SupportScale music strategy globally in key regions, including China, Korea, EMEA, and Brazil. Oversee content operations, implementing processes to optimize music distribution globally. Collaborate with Business Affairs on key label partnership decisions. Analyze data to inform artist selection, manage global spend, and project ROI. Manage music marketing budgets for key campaigns, ensuring effective allocation. Implement digital marketing campaigns with Riot’s social team to maximize music discovery and amplify player engagement with music. Support and advise on music strategies across all Riot IPs, including Esports, Valorant, and League Music. Identify and implement opportunities to expand the value of Riot’s music catalog in collaboration with the Music Supervision team. Required Qualifications: 7-10 years experience in music marketing and artist partnerships or similar roles Proven history creating and execute global marketing campaigns with experience in China and APAC, Strong knowledge of working with major DSPs like Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, etc., including negotiating and maintaining relationships with these platforms. Proven track record in managing relationships with record labels, artists, and managers, from negotiating deals to developing collaborative projects. Minimum 2 years experience managing and developing a team of marketers, as well as coordinating with cross-functional teams (e.g., artists, product teams, legal, and PR). Knowledge of licensing, publishing, and intellectual property as it pertains to music, especially in a gaming context Experience in tracking and analyzing the success of marketing campaigns through key performance indicators (KPIs), ROI, and data from streaming platforms or digital marketing campaigns. Ability to make adjustments to optimize campaign performance based on metrics. Deep understanding of evolving music consumption trends, including how younger audiences (e.g., Gen Z) engage with music across social platforms, interactive media, and experiential marketing. For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise and a collaborative spirit that prioritizes the delight of players. We will look at your past studies and experience, but for this role, we also look for dedicated people with a personal relationship with games. ArtSenior Technical Artist, Animation - Unpublished R&D ProductLos Angeles, USAJob Id: REQ-0009735As a Senior Technical Artist (Technical Animation), you’ll define and maintain the systems that bring our characters and creatures to life including complex animation state machines, layered interactions, and IK-driven behaviors in our upcoming MMO. Working at the intersection of animation, design, and engineering, you’ll build scalable animation graphs, ensure believable motion, and optimize performance across a vast, dynamic world. You’ll collaborate with animators, designers, and engineers to develop robust Unreal Engine animation systems that balance scalability, fidelity, and efficiency. As a key bridge between creative intent and technical execution, you’ll drive the evolution of our animation framework and ensure seamless, high-quality integration across the game. Responsibilities: Build and maintain complex animation state machines, layered animation systems, and override logic supporting split-body for player characters, NPCs, creatures, and props. Collaborate with animators, character tech artists, and designers to develop efficient, believable, and tech-friendly animation flows. Define best practices for animation setup while owning the debuggability, documentation, maintainability, and long-term health of animation blueprints and graphs within Unreal Engine. Partner with engineers to build and evolve animation runtime systems and debugging workflows. Drive optimization efforts across animation assets and graphs to meet performance and memory targets. Collaborate with cross-discipline partners to ensure character systems scale effectively across massive multiplayer environments. Develop scalable animation retargeting strategies to support characters and creatures of varying proportions while minimizing animation counts. Required Qualifications: 5+ years of professional experience as a technical animator or technical artist in games or related industries. Deep expertise with Unreal Engine animation workflows, including complex Animation Blueprints, state machines, blend spaces, and layered animation systems. Strong art foundation with a deep understanding of animation principles, anatomy, and motion. As a Senior Voice-Over Designer, you’ll harness the human voice as a powerful storytelling instrument, shaping character, emotion, and player connection through sound. You’ll design and implement interactive VO systems that respond dynamically to gameplay, blending creative vision, technical expertise, and bold experimentation to deliver larger-than-life voice experiences. Your mastery of audio craft, technical implementation, and multi-disciplinary collaboration will push the boundaries of what voice can achieve, elevating how players experience character expression and narrative through dialogue across our worlds. As a member of Riot’s Audio discipline, you’ll model creative excellence, share your expertise to elevate others, and continue to challenge and grow yourself. We focus on significant problem spaces and creating new key features to improve ARAM: Mayhem. Furthermore, we aim to deeply understand the players we serve as we craft features. As a Technical Game Designer II on the League of Legends ARAM: Mayhem team you will understand, design, optimize, build and communicate the player experience. Your analytical skills, player empathy, and creativity will help craft in- and out-of-game experiences that engage and surprise players. You will also work with engineering partners to act as a design representative for anything from tooling improvements to new features. Per the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, the following core duties may create a basis for disqualifying candidates with relevant criminal histories: Safeguarding confidential and sensitive Company data Communication with others, including Rioters and third parties such as vendors, and/or players, including minors Accessing Company assets, secure digital systems, and networks Ensuring a safe interactive environment for players and other Rioters These duties are directly related to essential operations, safety, trust, and compliance obligations within our organization. Please note that job duties may evolve based on business needs and additional responsibilities may be assigned as necessary to maintain operational efficiency and security. (Los Angeles Only) Base salary range between $150,000 - $209,600 USD + incentive compensation + equity + 401K with company match + medical, dental, vision, and life insurance + short and long-term disability + open PTO.Apply

apiJob.title: VFX Artist - VALORANT, Characters
apiJob.description:
ArtVFX Artist - VALORANT, CharactersLos Angeles, USAJob Id: REQ-0009215As part of the Real-Time VFX team, you’ll design and help implement the sleek, dynamic and dramatic special effects that add atmosphere and depth to gameplay. With your experience, you’ll create aesthetically astounding visual effects that communicate essential game information. You’ll use your artistic and technical skills to breathe life into undead spells, channel primal emotions and capture the essence of hundreds of champions. VALORANT is Riot’s take on a character-based tactical shooter (for more info on VALORANT click here!). As a VFX Artist on the VALORANT team, you will work closely with other VALORANT artists to communicate each effect’s actions, impact, and tonal experience, ultimately helping to bring the characters’ VFX to life. Responsibilities: Design and help implement the sleek, dynamic, and dramatic special effects that add atmosphere and depth to the gameplay Balance visual satisfaction and gameplay clarity while working to ensure amazing effects are accurately representing a given action or state Create aesthetically astounding visual effects that communicate essential game information and capture the essence of hundreds of characters Use your craft skills to draw, paint, animate and model with equal proficiency as-needed Use your encyclopedic knowledge of visual effects to synthesize brand new assets from classic designs Find creative and effective solutions to eliminate difficult problems in production and as-needed Required Qualifications: 2+ years of professional experience as a visual effects artist in games or related industries Experience working Unity, Unreal, or equivalent game engine VFX tools Desired Qualifications: Experience developing Unreal Blueprints Experience programming in C++ and UnrealScript As a part of the application process, candidates will be expected to provide a portfolio or demo reel of their work and may be asked to complete an art test. For this role, you'll find success through craft expertise and a collaborative spirit that prioritizes the delight of players. We will look at your past studies and experience, but for this role, we also look for dedicated people with a personal relationship with games. If you embody player empathy and care about players' experiences, this is the role for you! Our Perks: Riot focuses on work/life balance, shown by our open paid time off policy and other perks such as flexible work schedules. We offer medical, dental, and life insurance, parental leave for you, your spouse/domestic partner, and children, and a 401k with company match. Check out our benefits pages for more information. At Riot Games, we put players first. That mission drives every decision in our quest to create games and experiences that make it better to be a player. Whether you’re working directly on a new player-facing experience or you’re supporting the company as a whole, everyone at Riot is part of our mission. And just like in our games, we’re better when we work together. Our goal is to create collaborative teams where you are empowered to bring your unique perspective everyday. If that sounds like the kind of place you want to work, we’re looking forward to your application. It’s our policy to provide equal employment opportunity for all applicants and members of Riot Games, Inc. Riot Games makes reasonable accommodations for handicapped and disabled Rioters and does not unlawfully discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, handicap, veteran status, marital status, criminal history, or any other category protected by applicable federal and state law. We consider for employment all qualified applicants, including those with criminal histories, in a manner consistent with applicable federal, state and local law, including the California Fair Chance Act, the City of Los Angeles Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance for Employers, the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, and the Washington Fair Chance Act. Per the Los Angeles County Fair Chance Ordinance, the following core duties may create a basis for disqualifying candidates with relevant criminal histories: Safeguarding confidential and sensitive Company data Communication with others, including Rioters and third parties such as vendors, and/or players, including minors Accessing Company assets, secure digital systems, and networks Ensuring a safe interactive environment for players and other Rioters These duties are directly related to essential operations, safety, trust, and compliance obligations within our organization. Please note that job duties may evolve based on business needs and additional responsibilities may be assigned as necessary to maintain operational efficiency and security. (Los Angeles Only) Base salary range between $109,200.00 - $153,300.00 USD + incentive compensation + equity + 401K with company match + medical, dental, vision, and life insurance + short and long-term disability + open PTO.Apply

apiJob.title: VO Designer III (Contract)
apiJob.description:
AudioVO Designer III (Contract)SingaporeJob Id: 6038Riot Games was founded on the principles that putting players first leads to exceptional experiences. Since the launch of League of Legends in 2009, millions of players around the world log in each month to connect through our games and the characters that bring them to life. As we continue to expand our global content portfolio, we’re seeking a VO Designer III (Contract) based in Singapore to support voice productions across Riot’s products and select partnerships. That's where you come in. The VO Designer III guides the creative, technical, and production processes required to deliver high-quality VO content for Riot experiences. This hands-on role supports a small team of voice designers, collaborates with cross-disciplinary partners, and ensures VO assets reinforce character identity, narrative clarity, and an exceptional player experience. This is a craft supervision role focused on voice design. Responsibilities: Voice Design Creative Alignment Support Audio leads on voice design productions by assisting with scoping, coordination, and execution across VO workflows. Support established voice design direction by ensuring VO clarity, feasibility, and creative alignment across character, gameplay, and skin content. Represent voice design in kickoff and alignment meetings, sharing relevant creative context and direction. Provide clear, actionable feedback on VO work from internal and external partners. Scoping, Production & Implementation Support Assist in identifying VO opportunities, risks, and constraints, and align with Voice and Audio stakeholders on scope before production commitments. Collaboration with Production & Craft leads to clarify requirements and voice design implications. Support VO asset delivery, localization preparation, and technical implementation in Wwise and the game engine. Help troubleshoot VO-related issues during integration and playtest cycles. Vendor & Team Support Support external or outsourced voice designers through day-to-day guidance and review. Review vendor deliverables to ensure quality, consistency, and alignment with voice design expectations. Perform hands-on VO polish or support work when required. Quality & Process Help uphold creative and technical quality standards for VO assets. Validate technical specs and support in-engine verification. Follow and support established VO workflows, documentation, and delivery practices. Required Qualifications: 5+ years of experience developing audio for games, including shipped titles. Strong experience with voice-over production, processing tools, and techniques. Solid understanding of end-to-end game audio pipelines, including implementation and player experience considerations. Hands-on experience with game engines and Wwise audio middleware. Proficiency with standard audio creation tools (DAWs and common audio plug-ins). Ability to provide clear direction and timely, actionable feedback. Strong communication skills, with the ability to convey complex ideas clearly in English. Desired Qualifications: Familiarity with League of Legends and its characters, products, and player community. Experience mentoring or providing craft guidance to other designers. Experience directing professional voice actors in recording sessions. Familiarity with designing and maintaining dialogue systems and workflows within live-service development pipelines. Experience with advanced or specialized audio tools (e.g., Reaktor, synthesizers, or audio scripting). Familiarity with scripting or audio tooling (e.g., Lua or audio efficiency tools). Wwise certification or equivalent hands-on experience. Mandarin language proficiency is a plus. Employment Type: employment contract with Adecco, a professional personnel company in Singapore. Please note that Riot Games does not offer relocation packages for this position. You need to be able to work legally in Singapore, without Riot Games’ sponsorship, to be consideredApply

apiJob.description: Discover the values that define our global culture at Take-Two.

apiJob.title: ART, ANIMATION & SOUND​​​​​​​
apiJob.description: ART, ANIMATION & SOUND​​​​​​​ It takes artists of all kinds to bring the vision of our games to life.Artists add color and style to Blizzard characters, environments, cinematics, interfaces, web pages, comics, and more. They embrace the Blizzard style that’s persisted throughout our games—recognizable silhouettes and strong colors that guide players and add clarity and cohesion. They can create the artistic diversity that make up a Blizzard game. Whether that be painting muscle-bound orcs or glittering starscapes without sacrificing usability. Artists work with a variety of tools to make fantasies real and craft inviting worlds that spark the imagination of your peers. The beautiful (or terrifying) art they create ultimately supports and informs gameplay.Blizzard Sound collaborates with game designers to craft an audio experience that complements the gameplay and utilizes a collective artistic ‘voice’ in furthering a storyline via the medium of sound. The team has an outstanding ability to not only create excellent, original content, but to successfully integrate it into the final product--working with game designers, actors, artists, producers, and programmers to make sure that great concepts make the transition from the microphone to the game on the shelves. We’re looking for talented people who have a strong creative vision and a desire to wield mighty sonic weaponry in their pursuit of audio perfection! Our world-class video and post-production (VPP) team is responsible for expanding the lore and storytelling of our games through in-game cinematics and cut scenes, external shorts, and much more. VPP is part of Blizzard’s award winning story and franchise development team. Their mission is to support Blizzard's marketing and communications efforts through the development of epic digital content designed to inform, entertain, and engage Blizzard fans everywhere. ​​​​​​​View Open Jobs body { background-image: url(https://cdn.phenompeople.com/CareerConnectResources/prod/BLENGLOBAL/images/art-animation-sound_background-1589530563752.jpg); background-position: top; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: auto 1000px; background-color: #002650 !important; } @media screen and (max-width: 1280px) { body { background-size: auto 910px !important; } } @media screen and (max-width: 1024px) { body { background-size: auto 600px !important; } } .hero-block.short-header, .heading-block-hide.ph-fRtyv-bg, section[instance-id="vWcO9I"] div[instance-id="vWcO9I"] { background-color: transparent !important; } .job-info, .job-info span, .job-description { font-family: 'OpenSans-Regular' !important; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) !important; } section[instance-id="vWcO9I"] .ph-card .ph-card-block { transition: all .5s ease; } section[instance-id="vWcO9I"] .ph-card:hover .ph-card-block { background-color: rgba(1, 174, 255, 0.2) !important; border-color:rgba(0,174,255,.5) !important; } #footer .footer-block .footer-top-block { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); }

apiJob.title: GAME DESIGN
apiJob.description: GAME DESIGN Designers find the joy in our ideas.​​​​​​​Game designers shape the challenges and tune the weapons that our players run amok with. They make sure that our games delight the mind with interesting interactions between players and AI. It is their mission to construct mechanics that don’t require a manual to understand, keeping in mind that the best games are easy to learn, but difficult to master. Designers create fun for everyone, from hardcore competitors to casual weekend gamers. Blizzard designers aren’t just “idea people”—they find elegant and enduring designs everywhere, and implement them effectively with scripting, layout and testing. With world editing software at their fingertips, they iterate until our gameplay and user experiences shine as brightly as any gorgeous environment or stirring soundtrack. apiJob.title: UX & VISUAL DESIGN
apiJob.description: UX & VISUAL DESIGN Designers bring our dreams to reality.​​​​​​​Delivering epic entertainment experiences begins with elegant and intuitive User Experience (UX) and Visual Design. Our designers work closely with game designers, artists, and engineers to conceptualize, design, and iterate across all gameplay features and systems ensuring everything feels cohesive and easy to use from day one. Usability interviews, Web and business intelligence (BI) analytics, multivariate statistics, and data mining are the tricks of the trade they use to help our teams understand what our users are doing and why. apiJob.title: Skip to main content
apiJob.description: Heroes,Choose Your Role. ANALYTICS & RESEARCH​​​​​​​ Blizzard researchers seek to understand the behavior and needs of our players as they use our apps, websites and games. ART, ANIMATION & SOUND​​​​​​​ Artists work with a variety of tools to make fantasies real and craft inviting worlds that fuel the creativity of your peers. CORPORATE OPERATIONS​​​​​​​ Operations handles consumer products, human resources, legal, finance, and even more work related to our games in-house to make sure everything we do is polished until it shines. COMMUNITY, MARKETING & COMMUNICATIONS​​​​​​​ From coordinating events to keeping our global fan base informed and up to date, these pros spread the word about Blizzard games. GAME DESIGN​​​​​​​ Designers make sure that our games delight the mind with exciting interactions between players and AI. It is their mission to construct mechanics that don’t require a manual to understand, keeping in mind that the best games are easy to learn, but difficult to master. ENGINEERING & TECHNOLOGY​​​​​​​ Blizzard software engineers build and support the advanced infrastructure that allows us to craft the worlds of our games and that lets millions of fans play together. PRODUCTION, PROGRAM & PROJECT MANAGEMENT​​​​​​​ Producers help align the diverse skills of our content creators, and supervise sophisticated efforts that span multiple regions across the globe. QA, LOCALIZATION, & CS​​​​​​​ Focused on the players, this is the Birthplace of Blizzard "Polish." Whether it's our Quality Assurance, Localization, or Customer Service teams, we strive to deliver unforgettable gaming experiences for millions around the world. UX & VISUAL DESIGN​​​​​​​ Work closely with game designers, artists, and engineers to conceptualize, design, and iterate across all gameplay features and systems ensuring everything feels cohesive and easy to use from day one. Don’t miss this adventure. Live it. Life at Blizzard We pour our hearts and souls into everything we create. We’ve been crafting genre-defining games for millions of players around the world for more than 30 years. Hard work, iteration and polish go into the Blizzard “secret recipe,” but the most important ingredients come from dedicated people who share our vision. If that sounds like you, join us. Learn more Early Careers Whether you're wanting to be a part of our in-depth 12-week internship program or an exciting job right out of college, see why Blizzard could be the place for you. Learn more Connect with Us! Our people are the heroes behind our heroes. Follow Life at Blizzard for a look into their #blizzlife and what it's really like to work here. LinkedIn Instagram X (formerly Twitter) Join Our Talent Community! We’re on a quest: bring our dreams to life and craft the most epic entertainment experiences, ever! Join our talent community to keep up to date on open opportunities, game updates, company news, and more! Click to Join

Careers Overview Job Opportunities Development in the Groupe Overview The women and men working at Publicis are more ready to face the future than at any other creative company. since our birth in 1926, we have never stopped to lead the change. Talent@Publicis Groupe The women and men working at Publicis are more ready to face the future than at any other creative company. Since our birth in 1926, we have always been the leaders of change.We have always managed to anticipate the developments and inflection points of our industry – successfully investing in digital in its early stages, for example.Transformation means keeping pace with the huge changes taking place in the economy, in technology and in society at large. In an age of convergence and empowerment, we aim to attract people can help our clients reinvent themselves and guide them through their transformation. That’s the challenge: help our clients transform their business. It demands colorful personalities with an irrepressible passion for all the opportunities unleashed by digital disruption. Publicis Groupe Talent Equation Publicis Groupe’s philosophy revolves around the equation :( IQ + EQ + TQ )Intellectual Quotient, Technology Quotient and Emotional Quotient to power creativity and disruption.The talent we recruit has to score high on these elements: Intellectual Quotient: any approach to brand communication or product marketing requires serious thought and astute strategic counsel. Coupled with the need to transform a business model or marketing strategy, it’s led to the development of consulting as an activity in its own right. A strong IQ is therefore crucial to face the challenges of the Digital Age.Technology Quotient: we know how to make the most of the unprecedented capabilities of new technologies.Emotional Quotient: it’s the heart of our business and what makes us stand out. EQ, powered by creativity, ensures the success of the greatest alchemies, valorizing and transcending Publicis Groupe’s offer to bring a vital touch of humanity to our brand content. Anne-Gabrielle Heilbronner Secretary General, Publicis Groupe We strongly believe that together work’s better. No silo, no solo, no bozo is our compass.No silo: working in an integrated way is mandatory today.No solo: our craft needs teamwork, as there’s no successful soloist without a band.No bozo: we need the best and the brightest talent with positive attitude and spirit, to be all working in the same direction. The Power of One is what makes our clients win, and our staff succeed. We remain faithful to our “Viva La Difference” motto, we are a diverse and inclusive workplace. We assess candidates on passion and talent, rather than formal qualifications.Whether you come from prestigious universities or from the school of life, you’re welcome: Publicis values ALL profiles and individualities. If you like challenges, speed, transformation, and if you are passionate about what you do, we’re waiting for you. Discover the networks and agencies of Publicis Groupe Our Solutions News The groupe About PUBLICIS GROUPE Governance CSR History Careers Services Investors Investors & analysts Key figures Shareholders Share Price Media kit Legal mentions Privacy notice Accessibility Copyright © 2019 Publicis Groupe all rights reserved

apiJob.description: Shine, and rise. Recommended Creative Design Technology Strategy Delivery User Experience Filter Job Event Article Project Journal Studio Whitepaper Department Location Employment type Job model Region More tags From inspiration to implementation, AKQA has an unmatched reputation for influential work. Honoured as a Best Workplace for Innovators by Fast Company and recognised as a Great Place to Work, we have 29 international studios and are consistently among the world’s most awarded agencies. We aspire to push the boundaries, creating significant ideas, products and services at the forefront, in an environment where our people can thrive and are not constrained by convention. Thanks to successful collaborations with many of the world’s most prestigious organisations, AKQA is entrusted with design work across products and services, communications and commerce. Our people are united in the shared pursuit of becoming an employer of choice. With exposure to cutting-edge work in an engaging and supportive environment that champions creativity, belonging and conscientiousness, working at AKQA makes for a career enriched with opportunity, learning and progress. Great Place to Work Great Place to Work World Changing Idea Award 2024 World Changing Idea Award 2024 Most Innovative Companies Most Innovative Companies Top companies to work for in 2023 Top companies to work for in 2023 Glass: The Lion for Change 2024 Glass: The Lion for Change 2024 Leader Global Marketing Agencies Leader Global Marketing Agencies Design Design Creative Creative Technology Technology Strategy Strategy Delivery Delivery User Experience User Experience Please be vigilant to the possibility of recruitment fraud. apiJob.title: Creative Director - Visual & Motion Design
apiJob.description: <p>As a Creative Director at AKQA (part of WPP)&nbsp;you will bridge creative vision and execution across static and motion media. You will lead and mentor a team of UI/UX, visual &amp; motion designers, define high-quality visual standards, drive storytelling through creative ideation and ensure cohesive brand expression across campaigns, digital platforms, film/animation, and interactive media. You will partner closely with creative leadership, strategy, clients (internal or external), and production to deliver compelling, on-brand visual experiences.</p>\n<p>Your role is critical in elevating the visual voice of the agency, championing innovation in design, and translating big ideas into polished, emotionally engaging visual and animated work.</p>\n<p>Location - Mumbai&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>Role Requirements</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>12+ years of experience with a strong, diverse portfolio showcasing visual design, motion graphics, storytelling, animation, brand work, interactive pieces, and campaign-level thinking</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Expert proficiency in Adobe Creative Cloud (After Effects, Premiere Pro, Illustrator, Photoshop)</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Skilled in animation, compositing, visual effects, motion typography</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Experience in 3D tools (Cinema 4D, Blender, Maya, or equivalent) preferred</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Understanding of UI / UX motion (app/web animations)</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to work with Lottie / vector motion / web-embedded assets is a plus</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>You should be able to translate strategy or messaging into visually compelling narratives—static or motion</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to lead a team, guide, critique, mentor junior &amp; mid-level designers, and uphold quality and consistency across teams</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Comfortable working with creative directors, strategists, copywriters, producers, developers, and clients</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to articulate design rationale and present work convincingly</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ensuring final deliverables meet aesthetic, technical, and brand standards</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Stay updated on motion, design trends, tools, and evolving formats, bring fresh ideas and push visual boundaries</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Be comfortable to work in agency and on site client location as needed</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to estimate work effort, plan in collaboration with the program team and ensure consistent velocity of work output<br><br></p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>Qualifications &amp; Characteristics</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>You inspire and develop designers, giving constructive feedback and encouraging growth.</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Balance creative ambition with constraints, adapt quickly to changing briefs, and find smart solutions.</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Present ideas and design decisions with clarity and confidence to diverse stakeholders.</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Thrive in fast-paced environments, manage pressure, and maintain quality under tight timelines.</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>You believe in collaboration, respect diverse perspectives, and build camaraderie across creative, strategy, and production teams</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Possess great written and verbal communication skills</p>\n</li>\n</ul><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Interactive Visual Designer
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA (part of WPP) we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create beautiful ideas, products and services. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive digital services and applications that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.</p>\n<p>As an Interactive Visual Designer in the design team, you will shape user experiences for our client’s digital channels, ensuring that each interaction is intuitive, engaging, and reflects design excellence. You will design vibrant, usable, and technically sound visual experiences across digital touchpoints for our clients. You will focus on the intersection of motion, interface, and visual storytelling — enhancing usability through aesthetic and interactive visual designs. You will collaborate closely with UX, product, engineering, and design teams to bring ideas and concepts to life while maintaining visual and brand integrity.</p>\n<p>Your work will ensure that every screen, transition, micro-interaction, and visual asset aligns with established design ethos, elevating the creative vision and brand experience.</p>\n<p>Location - Mumbai&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>Role Requirements</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>6-8 years’ experience in visual, interactive, or UI design roles within agency, product, or digital studio environments</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Strong portfolio demonstrating interactive and/or motion-focused design across web &amp; mobile form factors</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Proficiency in design and prototyping tools (Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD, Principle, Framer, etc.)</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Solid grounding in typography, layout, color, iconography, and visual hierarchy</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Experience designing responsive/ adaptive interfaces across multiple platforms</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Familiarity with design systems, component libraries, and style guides</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Basic understanding of front-end (HTML, CSS, JS) for developer collaboration</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent) in Graphic Design, Interaction Design, Visual Communication, or related field</p>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>Qualifications and Characteristics</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>Strong visual eye: balance, polish, and design integrity</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Ability to craft smooth, thoughtful interactions and motion design</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Detail-oriented with a passion for pixel perfection and consistency</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Skilled at usability evaluation, prototyping, and iteration</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Comfortable working in a multi disciplinary set up and at client locations</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Curious and experimental — actively exploring trends, tools, and new techniques</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Resilient in fast-paced environments, adaptable to ambiguity and shifting priorities</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Proactive mindset, ownership mentality, and accountability from ideation to delivery</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Possess great written and verbal communication skills</p>\n</li>\n</ul><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Senior UI/ UX Designer
apiJob.description: <p>As a Senior UI/UX Designer in the design team, you will shape user experiences for our client’s digital channels, ensuring that each interaction is intuitive, engaging, and reflects design excellence. You will translate product strategy and user research into compelling, pixel-perfect interface designs, contributing to both high-level vision and hands-on craft. You will collaborate closely with stakeholders at AKQA (part of WPP) and the client, bridging creative, product, engineering, and content teams to execute delightful, usable digital products.</p>\n<p>Location - Mumbai&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>Role Requirements</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>\n<p>6–8 years in UI/UX, interaction, or digital product design, ideally in agency, product, or studio settings</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Strong portfolio showcasing end-to-end digital design: wireframes, prototypes, UI flows, visual design, and interactions/motion</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Experience designing multi-platform responsive/adaptive interfaces (web, iOS, iPad, etc.)</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Expert in design and prototyping tools (Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD, Framer, Principle)</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Solid skills in interaction design, micro-interactions, motion, IA, user flows, and wireframing</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Experience with design systems, style guides, modular UI, and component libraries</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Understanding of Web and app experience design and are familiar with current development technologies</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Familiarity with accessibility, localization, and inclusive design principles</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Skilled in usability testing, rapid prototyping, and iterative design</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Comfortable collaborating across product, engineering, content, creative and QA teams</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Strong communication skills and ability to advocate for user-centered design</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>Degree or equivalent in Interaction Design, Visual Design, HCI, Graphic Design, or related field</p>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p>High ownership, problem-solving mindset, and ability to deliver under tight apiJob.title: Creative Director
apiJob.description: <div>\n<div>\n<div>\n<div>\n<div>\n<div>At AKQA, we believe in the imaginative application of art, technology, and human insight to create meaningful experiences that shape the future. With an entrepreneurial and experimental mindset, we design ideas, products, and environments that don’t just communicate, they transform how people live, feel, and connect.</div>\n<div><br>As a Creative Director, Art, you will guide the visual direction across campaigns, platforms, identity expressions, film, social content, and integrated communication. You will lead multidisciplinary teams to develop world-class ideas, elevate craft, and ensure every visual output feels intentional, distinctive, and culturally resonant.</div>\n<div><br>You have a strong point of view, a refined sense of taste, and a deep understanding of how design and storytelling create meaning. You lead through inspiration, clarity, and creative pressure.<br>At AKQA you will have access to world-renowned thought leadership. You will work in an environment which fosters a meritocratic culture and encourages ownership, and you will be surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields.<br><br>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</div>\n<ul>\n<li>Direct with aesthetic conviction. You define the visual heartbeat of the idea, the mood, the palette, the rhythm, the cinematic energy, and you pull teams toward a stronger, sharper story through visuals.</li>\n<li>Lead with creative hunger. Drive concepts, visuals, and design systems with the energy of a maker and the ambition of a leader, pushing every idea to be braver, sharper, and more culturally relevant.</li>\n<li>Be a storyteller with taste. Shape narratives through visuals, composition, rhythm, and emotion, not just decoration. Every frame, layout, and edit must convey intention, story, and meaning.</li>\n<li>Craft with obsession. Whether it’s a platform identity, a film, a digital experience, a product UI, or a prototype, treat details like a signature. Your work should feel unmistakably world-class.</li>\n<li>Think beyond the screen. Build ideas that live as acts, installations, products, content ecosystems, and tech-enabled experiences, not just campaigns. Bring innovation and experimentation into the room naturally.</li>\n<li>Make ideas PR-able by design. Create visuals and concepts that earn cultural attention, not just meet a brief. Understand what travels regionally and globally, and design for impact.</li>\n<li>Elevate the room. Bring energy, references, inspiration, and ideas that push the team forward. Mentor juniors, shape thinking, and help raise the studio’s creative temperature.</li>\n<li>Challenge the brief, respectfully. Ask the questions others don’t. Find the tension, expose the opportunity, and push for the version of the work that truly moves people.</li>\n<li>Guard the quality. Be accountable for every output. Ensure every visual, layout, prototype, and film frame meets AKQA’s global standards and reflects the studio’s ambition.</li>\n<li>Mentor with generosity and pressure. You teach taste, discipline, and ambition. You show juniors what “good” looks like, and what “great” could be with two more pushes.</li>\n<li>Guard the quality with obsession. Every piece of communication that leaves the studio carries your imprint of excellence, consistent, intentional, unmistakably AKQA.</li>\n<li>Lead with informed curiosity. Stay attuned to visual culture, design movements, platform behaviours, emerging tools, and evolving aesthetics.</li>\n</ul>\n<div><br><br>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</div>\n<ul>\n<li>A portfolio demonstrating world-class art direction, visual storytelling, and integrated campaign craft and ideation.</li>\n<li>Experience leading multidisciplinary creative teams in communication-based environments.</li>\n<li>Strong sense of taste, composition, and storytelling through visuals.</li>\n<li>Deep cultural awareness, curiosity, and an experimental mindset</li>\n<li>Passion for pushing boundaries in mediums, formats, platforms, and ways of experiencing ideas.</li>\n<li>Confident communicator, clear, inspiring, and articulate.</li>\n<li>Passion for innovation, experimentation, and continually elevating craft.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>We are proactively engaging with talent for a prospective role in preparation for future business needs.</p>\n</div>\n<div>\n<div>Explore our extensive range of benefits&nbsp;<a href=\"https://www.akqa.com/studios/mena/benefits/\"><strong>here.</strong></a></div>\n</div>\n</div>\n<div>&nbsp;</div>\n<div>&nbsp;</div>\n</div>\n<div>\n<div>&nbsp;</div>\n</div>\n</div>\n</div><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Experience Designer
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create beautiful ideas, products and services. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive digital services and applications that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.</p>\n<p>Experience Designers at AKQA apply empathy, systems thinking, and craftsmanship to strategic insights — designing groundbreaking solutions to human problems. Adept storytellers and fearless innovators, they create interactive experiences, products and services that move the world.&nbsp;</p>\n<p>The Experience Designer plays an essential role in the growth of the Experience Design department. They will draw together client, business and customer/end-user requirements, within an understanding of the technical delivery environment, to develop a blueprint for the solution. They are the user-centered glue that binds together business, creative, and technology into a harmonious collaboration—facilitating design workshops, working with multi-disciplinary teams to deliver award-winning, impactful work.</p>\n<p>At AKQA Dubai, located in Media City, in Dubai, you’ll have the opportunity to produce meaningful work for world-class companies in one of the world’s most vibrant and beautiful cities, with access to our network of specialists across the global network of studios. You will work in an environment that fosters a dynamic and meritocratic culture, surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields.</p>\n<p>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Apply solid user experience and usability principles while looking for opportunities to innovate</li>\n<li>Demonstrate excellent knowledge of all aspects of the UCD approach and the ability to apply them flexibly across a variety of project types</li>\n<li>Able to contribute at a high level to the overall strategic client approach, taking into account relevant marketplace, consumer and technology factors--and a keen interest in growing within more strategic &amp; CX-focused disciplines&nbsp;</li>\n<li>Able to use/introduce more advanced UCD techniques (rapid prototyping, remote testing etc.) to improve efficiency in the user experience process and the quality of the solution</li>\n<li>Able to develop solutions for a wide variety of touchpoints, platforms and devices including mobile, web, kiosk, social, physical, etc.</li>\n<li>Lead User Experience work streams on large-scale and complex projects</li>\n<li>Promote collaborative work practices, and identify opportunities to improve quality and increase efficiency through collaborative design</li>\n<li>Demonstrate cross-functional understanding; clearly articulate purpose and value of other disciplines within Strategic Services, identifying when their input is needed</li>\n<li>Collaborate with the client and with various teams within AKQA. Ability to lead workshops and manage mid to senior stakeholders. Experience of nurturing client relationships</li>\n<li>Provide support, guidance and mentoring to junior members of the User Experience Team</li>\n<li>Take an active role in new business pitches where appropriate</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Embrace challenges and inspire new ways of thinking</li>\n<li>Expertise in understanding digital behaviours, cultural expectations and social networking (preferred experience with Asia or luxury industries)</li>\n<li>Fluent in English with a strong command of the language, both written and spoken</li>\n<li>A compelling portfolio of unique work that spans mediums, including: mobile applications, responsive web, product &amp; service design.&nbsp;</li>\n<li>Wide breadth of experience in your portfolio demonstrating skills across Research, Strategy, IA, Design and Testing. Experience with ethnographic research, ecosystem design, information architecture, and user testing and experience with innovation processes including Design Thinking workshops, Google Design Sprints, Business Model and/or Value Proposition canvas</li>\n<li>Expertise with prototyping tools such; along with design tools such as Sketch &amp; Figma.</li>\n<li>Proven creative success working in collaborative, multi-functional teams</li>\n<li>Strong presentation skills, visual and written</li>\n<li>Breadth of cultural reference points</li>\n<li>You have a drive to break boundaries and craft the best ideas of their kind in the world</li>\n<li>You are passionate, driven and obsessed about your craft and stay on top of best practice in your field</li>\n</ul><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. apiJob.title: Senior Designer
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA, we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create a better future. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive ideas, services and experiences that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.</p>\n<p>Designers at AKQA apply systems thinking and craft to create brands, products, and experiences that people genuinely want to use, wear, share, and come back to. In a multidisciplinary environment, they translate insight into form, shaping identities, interfaces, and design languages that feel both culturally alive and beautifully precise.</p>\n<p>As a Senior Designer in MENA, you'll play an essential role in shaping the design vision and craft of work across brand, digital, product, experience and campaign. You'll help define and build design systems, produce exceptional work, identities and prototypes, and collaborate closely with creative, strategy, tech, delivery and production to create transformative work for regional and global clients.</p>\n<p>At AKQA you will have access to world-renowned thought leadership from influential authors, athletes, artists and entrepreneurs. You will work in an environment which fosters a meritocratic culture and encourages ownership, and you will be surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields.&nbsp;</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Lead with maker energy. Drive design, craft, and execution with pace and pride, raising the bar on every visual, system, and experience, and pushing visuals to be bolder, clearer, and more culturally relevant.</li>\n<li>Think in systems, not assets. Build identities and design languages that scale across channels and evolve over time. Create rules and rythms, not just one-off screens.</li>\n<li>Craft with obsession. Sweat the details: spacing, alignment, type, transitions, iconography, accessibility, responsiveness. Your work should feel authored, intentional and world-class.</li>\n<li>Design beyond the screen. Bring the same design intelligence to environments, packaging, content ecosystems, installations and tech-enabled experiences. Understand how a brand behaves in the real world.</li>\n<li>Make work that travels. Create a design with PR potential: iconic, ownable, culturally legible. Understand what will land locally in MENA and what will travel globally.</li>\n<li>Own the process end-to-end. From early explorations and mood boards to design development, artworking, production files and QA, you shepherd quality through every phase.</li>\n<li>Collaborate like a modern designer. Work fluidly with writers, strategists, creative directors, technologists, makers, AI tools and the broader AKQA network. Invite critique and use friction to sharpen outcomes.</li>\n<li>Present with clarity and taste. Tell the design story: the rationale, the system, the choices and the craft, guiding clients through what matters and why it works.</li>\n<li>Guard the standard. Be accountable for every deliverable. Ensure every layout, screen, prototype, deck page and asset meets AKQA's global level and reflects the studio's ambition.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>A compelling portfolio demonstrating design craft and systems thinking across brand, digital, product, campaign and/or experience work.</li>\n<li>Strong ability to develop visual identities, design systems</li>\n<li>Confident in typography, composition, hierarchy and grid systems; high attention to detail.</li>\n<li>Proven success working in collaborative, multi-functional teams.</li>\n<li>Strong design presentation skills (visual and written).</li>\n<li>Culturally literate with a breadth of reference points, and the ability to translate culture into design decisions (not just mood boards).</li>\n<li>Hungry to push boundaries and make work that is distinctive, modern and craft-led.</li>\n<li>Passionate about design best practices and continuously improving your craft.</li>\n<li>Experience in presenting to clients and supporting senior leads is advantageous.</li>\n<li>Degree in Design, Visual Communication, Interaction Design, Visual Studies or related field preferred.</li>\n<li>Extensive experience with industry-standard tools (e.g. Figma, Adobe Creative Suite...).</li>\n<li>Appreciation for production realities: print, digital delivery, responsive behaviour and quality assurance.</li>\n<li>Supplementary skills appreciated: motion design, photography, illustration, 3D, generative/AI workflows, digital installations, creative coding.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;Explore our extensive range of benefits <a href=\"https://www.akqa.com/studios/cairo/benefits/\">here</a>&nbsp;</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection.
