apiJob.title: Creative Director (Tokyo)
apiJob.description: <p>As a Creative Director and the leader of the AKQA Tokyo (part of WPP) studio’s Creative department, you will create and inspire work that is distinctive, unfamiliar, effective and truly remarkable to make a difference to consumers’ behavior through ideas, creativity and the use of interactive media. You will inspire and lead a team to raise their bar even higher, mentoring a team, leading by example and championing the discipline in the wider agency and beyond.&nbsp;</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>Role Requirements</strong></p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Deliver and inspire award-winning work from both yourself and others who work with you, influencing where appropriate a dramatic change through ideas, creativity and the use of interactive media.</li>\n<li>Lead, direct and manage cross-disciplinary and culturally diverse set of talents, both internal and external to AKQA to deliver successful solutions and high-quality works to clients on time.</li>\n<li>Create ground-breaking work that positively impacts our clients, our teams and the world.</li>\n<li>Foster and line-manage creatives that are eager to grow their craft in art direction, copywriting or design.</li>\n<li>High level of accuracy and attention to detail.</li>\n<li>Learn new skills and stay abreast of technical and digital design developments, and successfully apply them to work practices to help improve processes and procedures.</li>\n<li>Act as the creative representative of the Tokyo studio within and outside AKQA network, in Japanese and in English. Work with other AKQA network creatives collaboratively on joint initiatives.</li>\n<li>Work closely with the strategy teams to shape briefs that empower our teams to deliver work that pushes our client's brand to the forefront of their global audience's minds</li>\n<li>&nbsp;</li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Creative briefs </strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Contributes to strategic development of a well-defined creative brief and any additional briefing documents, speaking with the client directly when necessary. Listens to and responds to a brief, understanding where/if there are gaps. Knows what questions to ask during the briefing session in order to act upon it. Understands how to respond to a brief.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Idea generation</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Leads by example to consistently inspire creative colleagues to originate world- class, pioneering ideas that conceptualize world-class solutions. Generates useful, usable ideas across all existing and emerging digital platforms. Continually develops practices and processes to inspire, innovate and harness new ways of thinking.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>◊</strong> <strong>New business development </strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Creatively leads new business pitches. Responsible for crisp ideas and creative workflow; effective and dynamic storyteller for oral pitch presentation in both Japanese &amp; English.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Creative craft skills</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Selects most appropriate supplier for required task. Successfully leads multiple suppliers, partners and clients to ensure outsourced projects are creatively delivered on time, within budget and to the highest standards. Helps to ensure AKQA continues to create unique and inspirational solutions.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Team management</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Manages creatives as direct reports. Provides an international and supportive working environment, based on openness, trust and regular constructive feedback on performance. Sets clear and achievable goals. Takes immediate action to address performance/conduct issues. Assesses a broad range of tasks and determines which team member should manage to ensure delivery to the highest standard. Is an ambassador for AKQA and its values at all times.</li>\n<li>Demonstrates creative success in leading collaborative multidisciplinary teams, including project planning, to winning a number of industry recognized awards.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Stakeholder management</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Successfully manages multiple suppliers, partners and customers to ensure the best outcome for both customer and AKQA. Keeps stakeholders informed of project progress at all times and manages expectations proactively.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>Client Leadership</strong>\n<ul>\n<li>Understand client business goals and ambitions. Takes briefs from clients and successfully creates stories that communicate client’s needs and ambitions to the consumers.</li>\n</ul>\n</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>AKQA Competencies</strong></p>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Innovation</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Seen as a transformational leader in the industry who is capable of driving change throughout an organization. Is able to articulate a compelling business case and can galvanize the team to action in face of change. Creates an environment that challenges traditional thinking, status quo, Japanese industry norms and ensures the company stays far ahead of competition and clients.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Service&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Able to deftly manage most senior client expectations, particularly those that conflict with the company’s recommendations, and can drive successful outcomes while maintaining (or even growing) the relationship. Develops strategies to build a climate of trust, openness and respect; forges strong relationships to drive successful outcomes.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Quality&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Has the ability to set the tone for the team and believes that without the greatest work, nothing else matters. Possesses a strong bias to action and is able to consistently deliver high quality work within required timeframes. Possesses a strong bias to action and is energized by challenges; is a visible champion of excellence and perfect delivery. Is upbeat and committed to their working life and makes a positive contribution to team morale.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Thought&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Develops long-term strategic partne

apiJob.title: Associate Creative Director (Tokyo)
apiJob.description: <p>AKQA (part of WPP) is a creative agency that transforms strategic insights into beautiful concepts through art and craftsmanship, guiding clients toward a better future.</p>\n<p><br>As an Associate Creative Director, you will be expected to go beyond the brief—developing strategic approaches based on consumer insight, generating bold and innovative ideas, and presenting them as compelling narratives to clients.<br><br></p>\n<p>At AKQA, our work extends far beyond advertising. From building brand and CX visions to designing digital and physical experiences, our projects span a wide range of disciplines. While leveraging your creative expertise built through past experience, you will also be expected to cross boundaries and take on new challenges in unexplored domains.<br><br></p>\n<p>In particular, AKQA Tokyo is on a mission to grow our team and become Japan’s leading creative agency—one that creates a better future for brands through transformative brand experiences that go beyond traditional marketing. We are looking for passionate, ambitious new talent to join us in this journey.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>Role Requirements</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Deliver and inspire award-winning work from both yourself and others who work with you, influencing where appropriate a dramatic change through ideas, creativity and the use of interactive media.</li>\n<li>Lead, direct and manage a cross-disciplinary and culturally diverse set of talents, both internal and external to AKQA to deliver successful solutions and high-quality works to clients on time.</li>\n<li>Create ground-breaking work that positively impacts our clients, our teams and the world.</li>\n<li>Foster and line-manage creatives that are eager to grow their craft in art direction, copywriting or design.</li>\n<li>Learn new skills and stay abreast of technical and digital design developments, and successfully apply them to work practices to help improve processes and procedures.</li>\n<li>Work with other AKQA network creatives collaboratively on joint initiatives.</li>\n<li>Work closely with the strategy teams to shape briefs that empower our teams to deliver work that pushes our client's brand to the forefront of their global audience's minds.</li>\n<li>Extensive hands-on experience in client work within Japan, with the ability to communicate effectively with both team members and clients in both Japanese and English.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>Key Responsibilities<br><br></p>\n<ul>\n<li>Creative briefs</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Contributes to strategic development of a well-defined creative brief and any additional briefing documents, speaking with the client directly when necessary. Listens to and responds to a brief, understanding where/if there are gaps. Knows what questions to ask during the briefing session in order to act upon it. Understands how to respond to a brief.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Idea generation<br>Leads by example to consistently inspire creative colleagues to originate world- class, pioneering ideas that conceptualize world-class solutions. Generates useful, usable ideas across all existing and emerging digital platforms. Continually develops practices and processes to inspire, innovate and harness new ways of thinking.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>New business development<br>Creatively leads new business pitches. Responsible for crisp ideas and creative workflow; effective and dynamic storyteller for oral pitch presentation.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Creative craft skills<br>Selects the most appropriate supplier for the required task. Successfully leads multiple suppliers, partners and clients to ensure outsourced projects are creatively delivered on time, within budget and to the highest standards. Helps to ensure AKQA continues to create unique and inspirational solutions.<br><br></li>\n<li>Stakeholder management<br>Successfully manages multiple suppliers, partners and customers to ensure the best outcome for both customer and AKQA. Keeps stakeholders informed of project progress at all times and manages expectations proactively.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Client Leadership<br>Understand client business goals and ambitions. Takes briefs from clients and successfully creates stories that communicate client’s needs and ambitions to the consumers.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Senior User Experience (UX) Designer
apiJob.description: <p>Experience Designers at AKQA (part of WPP) concept, craft and deliver interfaces that make technology more natural and enjoyable to use. In collaboration with strategists, researchers and technologists, our UI and UX designers take a human-centred approach to create beautiful and meaningful brand experiences.</p>\n<p>As a Senior UX Designer you will play an essential role balancing business, customer and technical requirements to craft blueprints for solutions that delight clients and users.</p>\n<p>As part of the AKQA team in Tokyo, you will work in a dynamic, globally-minded environment surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields. Together you will create world-class experiences for both Japanese and overseas markets.</p>\n<p><strong>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>Plan and execute core UX/CX deliverables including heuristic and IA audits, ecosystem maps, personas, customer journeys, service blueprints, and wireframes</li>\n<li>Collaborate across disciplines in both agile and waterfall processes to quickly deliver impactful solutions</li>\n<li>Present to business stakeholders to help them make informed decisions that strengthen their business</li>\n<li>Keep on top of best practices and trends to ensure we are at the forefront of the industry</li>\n<li>Lead and inspire, sharing your knowledge with peers and mentoring mid/junior designers<br><br></li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>A compelling portfolio demonstrating outstanding UX design, with a desire to become even better</li>\n<li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to make complex topics understandable, and present logically</li>\n<li>Excellent writing and editing skills, experienced in crafting effective, on-brand micro copy</li>\n<li>Mastery of whiteboard and prototyping software such as Miro and Figma</li>\n<li>A “can-do” attitude, eager to embrace big challenges</li>\n<li>Attention to detail and a passion for getting to the root of a problem</li>\n<li>Ability to thrive in a global team, with an open mind to fresh perspectives</li>\n<li>Proven experience working in a Senior UX Design role (agency or in-house)</li>\n<li>A degree in Interaction Design, Information Architecture or other design-related field is preferred</li>\n<li>Fluency in Japanese at N1 or native level is required</li>\n<li>Conversational or higher English ability is preferred but not required</li>\n</ul>\n<p>#LI-DNI</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Associate Design Director (XD) (UKA) (Tokyo)
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA (part of WPP) we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create beautiful ideas, products and services. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we design adaptive digital services and experiences that capture the imagination, delivering impressive returns for our clients.&nbsp;</p>\n<p>The Associate Design Director at AKQA will approach every brief with fresh eyes. Avoiding familiar solutions, the candidate will create and inspire work that is distinctive, effective and truly remarkable. They lead by example to consistently inspire creative colleagues to create world-class, pioneering ideas that conceptualise world-class solutions, while acting as a strategic and conceptual leader on projects. Associate Design Directors at AKQA display a cohesive understanding and can execute the principles that make innovative and effective digital communications, interface design, and interaction design.</p>\n<p>We exist to create the future with our clients and that partnership is the basis of our practice. We work collaboratively across client teams to ensure each experience is of the highest quality and has a measurable impact on the customer and business alike.</p>\n<p>As part of the AKQA team in Tokyo, you will work in a dynamic, globally-minded environment surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields. Together you will create world-class experiences for both Japanese and overseas markets.</p>\n<p><strong>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>Sets creative direction throughout all phases of project work from discovery to launch and beyond with ongoing optimization</li>\n<li>Acts as a creative lead for one or more accounts, managing multiple tracks of work across a variety of teams</li>\n<li>Works internally and with clients to develop the strategy, experience concepts and establish the overarching design direction for the experience</li>\n<li>Produces compelling and highly usable experience solutions in response to client needs</li>\n<li>Communicates and represents creative vision and execution with client partners</li>\n<li>Continually develops processes to inspire, innovate, and harness new ways of thinking</li>\n<li>Inspires and leads by example, setting professional standards for the team and the department</li>\n<li>Actively trains, mentors, and manages junior to mid-level creatives and designers.</li>\n<li>Responsible for managing and guiding junior to mid-level creatives’ careers within AKQA (including regular one-on-one check-ins), writing and delivering annual performance reviews, and taking responsibility for on-boarding new employees and guiding them through a successful tenure at AKQA</li>\n<li>Creatively participates in new business pitches – i.e. responsible for ideas and creative work, and competently presents pitches</li>\n<li>Be able to guide but also prepared to be hands on with exceptional experience in industry design tools<br><br></li>\n</ul>\n<p><strong>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>A minimum of 7 years’ experience in the creative industry</li>\n<li>Native or fluent Japanese reading and speaking ability is essential.</li>\n<li>All candidates must possess a portfolio showcasing a comprehensive understanding of how l their creative disciplines comes to life and how they applied their thinking, including conceptual and executional (art direction, user experience and UI design) contribute to a finished product</li>\n<li>Demonstrated creative success in leading collaborative cross disciplinary teams</li>\n<li>A solid understanding of the marketing industry at large; an ability and a desire to adapt to the changing landscape of technology</li>\n<li>Experience in, and enthusiasm for, creating digital platforms and products from brief to delivery and beyond.</li>\n<li>Experience in side-by-side collaboration with UX and development teams and leaders</li>\n<li>Strong working knowledge of user interface, application, mobile and responsive design</li>\n<li>Exceptional communication skills: Verbal, written, interpersonal and inter-departmental</li>\n<li>Superb professionalism and mature presence in all aspects of the job</li>\n<li>Thought leadership: A strong point of view; ability to contribute to the strategic development of an assignment; creative ideas and the ability to promote conceptual thinking among the team</li>\n</ul>\n<p>#LI-DNI</p>\n<p><br><br></p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Senior UI Designer
apiJob.description: <p>Experience Designers at AKQA (part of WPP) concept, craft and deliver interfaces that make technology more natural and enjoyable to use. In collaboration with strategists, researchers and technologists, our UI and UX designers take a human-centred approach to create beautiful and meaningful brand experiences.</p>\n<p>As a Senior UI Designer, you will play an essential role in conception and design; bringing exceptional creative thinking and craft to deliver digital experiences that delight clients and users.</p>\n<p>As part of the AKQA team in Tokyo, you will work in a dynamic, globally-minded environment surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields. Together you will create world-class experiences for both Japanese and overseas markets.</p>\n<p>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Demonstrate world-class execution of innovative and effective digital communication design, interface design, and interaction design across all digital platforms.</li>\n<li>Consistently deliver systematic, responsive design solutions through an agile methodology.</li>\n<li>Apply your skills in pitches to bring ideas to life, inspiring and exciting potential clients.</li>\n<li>Present design work confidently to stakeholders, and build trusting relationships.</li>\n<li>Ideate, co-design and refine with peers and clients in a positive and collaborative manner.</li>\n<li>Ensure projects and tasks are delivered on time, on budget, and to the highest quality.</li>\n<li>Learn new skills and stay abreast of design and technical developments. Advocate for and apply best practices to keep our team at the forefront of the industry.</li>\n<li>Keep on top of current and upcoming cultural trends — both in Japan and globally.</li>\n<li>Lead and inspire, sharing your knowledge with peers and mentoring mid/junior designers.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>EXPERIENCE AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Outstanding typography and layout skills; demonstrating range and subtlety.</li>\n<li>Sensitivity to colour, shadows, motion and details that others may not consciously notice.</li>\n<li>Exceptional design aesthetics with a portfolio to demonstrate.</li>\n<li>Experience in creating and presenting concepts through mood boards and prototypes.</li>\n<li>Experience in taking designs from low-fidelity wireframes to polished digital products.</li>\n<li>Experience in atomic design principles and building design systems that scale.</li>\n<li>Understanding of usability and accessibility best practices.</li>\n<li>Understanding of the technical possibilities and limitations of web and app development.</li>\n<li>Excellent verbal, visual and written communication skills, with the ability to present logically, objectively and inspiringly.</li>\n<li>Native or fluent Japanese reading and speaking ability is essential.</li>\n<li>Intermediate or higher English ability is preferred.</li>\n<li>Ability to thrive in a global team, with an open mind to fresh perspectives.</li>\n<li>Strong experience in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite and prototyping tools.</li>\n<li>Proven experience working in a Senior Design role (agency or client-side).</li>\n<li>A degree in Design, Interaction Design, or other design-related field is preferred.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>#LI-DNI</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. We unite&nbsp;cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel&nbsp;in a single company –&nbsp;powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open,&nbsp;to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Motion Designer
apiJob.description: <p>Creatives at AKQA apply artistry and craftsmanship to strategic insight, creating and bringing to life beautiful and technologically innovative ideas that move the world. From a variety of backgrounds and disciplines, our creatives are innately curious and strive to transform client challenges into beautiful, cutting-edge solutions.</p>\n<p>As a Motion Designer at our Berlin studio, you’ll be instrumental in building impactful brand motion systems, animating engaging campaigns, and crafting captivating experiences across digital products, .com platforms, and apps. With strong conceptual and strategic foundations, you’ll work alongside art directors, designers, and our broader creative team to transform ideas into captivating motion graphics and animations that will elevate our clients’ brand stories across every touchpoint. You’re a visionary designer who sees motion as an art form that plays a key role in bringing a brand to life across the entire customer journey.</p>\n<p>As part of the AKQA team, you will work in an environment that fosters a dynamic and inclusive culture, enabled by our multidisciplinary approach and supported by some of the brightest minds in their field. You will report to a Creative Director and will have a close, collaborative relationship with the other Creative, Design, and Experience leads across the studio.</p>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</strong></p>\n<ul data-start=\"258\" data-end=\"1800\">\n<li data-start=\"258\" data-end=\"481\">Lead the creation of distinctive motion design systems for brand identities, marketing campaigns, digital products (.com platforms, apps), and communications—grounded in strong conceptual thinking and strategic insight.</li>\n<li data-start=\"482\" data-end=\"700\">Design and deliver high-quality 2D and 3D motion, UI animations, and brand motion principles across a wide range of outputs, including brand films, campaign sizzles, social content, and immersive visual narratives.</li>\n<li data-start=\"701\" data-end=\"876\">Collaborate closely with creative directors, art directors, brand and experience designers, and client teams to bring ambitious ideas to life and push creative boundaries.</li>\n<li data-start=\"877\" data-end=\"1050\">Stay at the forefront of motion and digital design trends, combining tools, techniques, and emerging technologies to create work that shapes culture and elevates brands.</li>\n<li data-start=\"1051\" data-end=\"1224\">Confidently move between defining scalable motion systems, animating high-impact campaigns, and enhancing digital product experiences with thoughtful, expressive motion.</li>\n<li data-start=\"1225\" data-end=\"1356\">Create clear, compelling client-facing presentations that communicate vision, conceptual rationale, and executional guidelines.</li>\n<li data-start=\"1357\" data-end=\"1481\">Translate brand and experience strategies into innovative motion solutions for complex, multi-channel design challenges.</li>\n<li data-start=\"1482\" data-end=\"1629\">Mentor and support mid-level and junior designers, helping raise the overall quality and ambition of motion work across film, 2D/3D, and video.</li>\n<li data-start=\"1630\" data-end=\"1800\">Lead the motion discipline on client projects, owning deliverables, maintaining momentum, and ensuring work meets timelines and AKQA’s standards of creative excellence.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul data-start=\"1839\" data-end=\"2713\">\n<li data-start=\"1839\" data-end=\"2002\">A standout portfolio demonstrating depth and range across brand identity, integrated campaigns, communications, and digital product experiences (.com and app).</li>\n<li data-start=\"2003\" data-end=\"2060\">5+ years of professional experience in motion design.</li>\n<li data-start=\"2061\" data-end=\"2248\">Advanced expertise in After Effects and strong proficiency with relevant design tools, paired with a curiosity for emerging platforms and techniques such as TouchDesigner and Cavalry.</li>\n<li data-start=\"2249\" data-end=\"2381\">A culturally curious mindset, with a strong awareness of design, technology, and visual culture—and an instinct for what’s next.</li>\n<li data-start=\"2382\" data-end=\"2481\">Experience with Cinema 4D, Houdini, or other 3D tools is a plus, though not a core requirement.</li>\n<li data-start=\"2482\" data-end=\"2620\">A conceptual thinker who approaches motion with intention—always understanding the “why” behind every movement, system, and execution.</li>\n<li data-start=\"2621\" data-end=\"2713\">A self-driven learner with a relentless desire to grow, experiment, and refine your craft.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Explore our extensive range of benefits <a href=\"https://www.akqa.com/studios/berlin/benefits/\">here</a></p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. apiJob.title: Senior Strategic Experience Designer
apiJob.description: <p>At AKQA we believe in the imaginative application of art and science to create beautiful and performative ideas, products and services. With an entrepreneurial and collaborative approach, we craft powerful storytelling, design adaptive digital services and applications that capture the imagination, delivering meaningful returns for our clients.</p>\n<p>The Senior Strategic Experience Designer at AKQA Amsterdam leads complex, large-scale projects that create exceptional brand experiences, ones that meet real human needs, drive measurable results, and push creative boundaries. At this level, you are not just a contributor; you are a strategic leader, a trusted advisor to clients, and a shaping force within the studio. You are the ultimate orchestrator of experience direction, holding the vision, connecting the dots across disciplines, and ensuring the work is both creatively ambitious and grounded in genuine human insight.</p>\n<p>You bring a rare combination of analytical rigour and creative instinct. You help clients frame and dissect complex business problems with structure and clarity, while using design thinking and strategy to develop bold, innovative visions that drive meaningful change. You set the standard for what great looks like: in the work, in how we work, and in how we show up for our clients and each other.</p>\n<p>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Own the full strategic experience design process end-to-end: from brief interpretation and problem framing, through research and insight generation, to concept definition and experience vision; ensuring every decision is purposeful, connected, and human-centred.</li>\n<li>Lead and inspire multidisciplinary teams across research, strategy, design, and technology, creating the conditions for ambitious, collaborative work while balancing output with team wellbeing.</li>\n<li>Frame client challenges with clarity and confidence, identifying the right questions before jumping to answers, and translating complexity into actionable strategic directions and experience concepts.</li>\n<li>Drive discovery and research, leading stakeholder interviews, user research, competitive analysis, and synthesis, turning findings into sharp insights and compelling strategic narratives that guide creative and design execution teams.</li>\n<li>Act as a trusted advisor and thought partner to senior clients, challenging perspectives where needed, building relationships grounded in both empathy and expertise, and proactively identifying opportunities beyond the immediate engagement.</li>\n<li>Own the development of pitches, proposals, and new business opportunities, independently and in partnership with client service teams, demonstrating a clear understanding of where AKQA can create the most value.</li>\n<li>Develop and communicate experience visions, strategic frameworks, concepts, and recommendations with exceptional clarity, both visually and verbally, for internal stakeholders and client audiences at all levels.</li>\n<li>Establish and champion human-centred design methodologies and best practices across the studio, contributing to the evolution of our processes, tools, and point of view at a global level.</li>\n<li>Coach and develop mid-level and junior team members through constructive feedback, on-the-job mentorship, and by modelling intellectual curiosity, creative ambition, and kindness under pressure.</li>\n<li>Contribute to shaping the overall culture of the Experience Design and Strategy, fostering an inclusive, intellectually ambitious environment where every voice is valued and great thinking is celebrated.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Experience within a consultancy, experience design agency, or innovation environment where strategy, human-centred design, and digital innovation are central to the work.</li>\n<li>A proven track record of leading end-to-end experience and service design projects across digital and physical touchpoints, from early-stage discovery through to concept definition and execution.</li>\n<li>Deep expertise in qualitative research methodologies (including ethnography, UX research, cultural analysis) and the ability to synthesise complex findings into clear, strategic direction.</li>\n<li>Experience developing growth strategies, defining new value propositions, or shaping new digital products and services in response to shifting business and cultural landscapes.</li>\n<li>An entrepreneurial mindset, comfortable operating in ambiguity, able to self-organise and bring structure to complexity, and confident in defining the path forward for yourself and your team.</li>\n<li>Exceptional communication and storytelling skills, with the ability to inspire confidence in clients and motivate teams around a shared vision.</li>\n<li>Strong cross-functional leadership skills, with experience guiding diverse teams and navigating senior client relationships with both authority and humility.</li>\n<li>A genuine passion for the intersection of business, culture, and technology; and a restless curiosity about what the future of experience design can and should look like.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Explore our extensive range of benefits&nbsp;<a href=\"https://www.akqa.com/studios/amsterdam/benefits\">here</a>.</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach including required in-office days. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span></p>\n<p><span>AKQA is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p>\n<hr>\n<p><span></span></p>\n<p><strong><span data-olk-copy-source=\"MessageBody\">About WPP</span></strong></p>\n<p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. For more information, visit&nbsp;<a href=\"http://wpp.com/\" data-auth=\"NotApplicable\" data-linkindex=\"0\">WPP.com</a>.</p>\n<p><span></span></p></div>

apiJob.title: Designer
apiJob.description: <p>Creatives at AKQA apply artistry and craftsmanship to strategic insight, creating and bringing to life beautiful and technologically innovative ideas that move the world. From a variety of backgrounds and disciplines, our creatives are innately curious and strive to transform client challenges into beautiful, cutting-edge solutions.</p>\n<p>The Designer is a key contributor to the imaginative application of craft and visual storytelling across brand and digital experiences. They are a versatile talent, adept at developing and executing design solutions, and contributing to scalable visual systems. Collaborating across disciplines, they translate strategic insights into compelling design codes. This role demands a curious, open, and passionate individual with a can-do mindset, deeply engaged with design, art direction, culture, tech, and AI.</p>\n<p>Located on the Nieuwe Herengracht in central Amsterdam, you will work in an environment which fosters a meritocratic culture and encourages ownership, and you will be surrounded by some of the brightest minds in their fields.</p>\n<p>ROLE REQUIREMENTS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Concept &amp; Craft: Contribute to and execute innovative visual design from concept to delivery across brand, campaign, and digital experiences, under the guidance of senior team members.</li>\n<li>Independent Contribution: Deliver high-quality design work with a strong sense of ownership and attention to detail, seeking feedback and support when needed.</li>\n<li>Meaning into Form: Translate strategic insights into compelling visual narratives and distinctive design codes, understanding the 'why' behind the work.</li>\n<li>Systematic Application: Apply and contribute to scalable visual systems, ensuring consistency and craft across platforms, channels, and moments.</li>\n<li>Visual Intent: Draw inspiration from culture, fashion, photography, and design to inform and contribute to distinct, contemporary art direction.</li>\n<li>Clear Communication: Present design work clearly and articulate design decisions to internal teams, with opportunities to present to clients.</li>\n<li>Interdisciplinary Team Collaboration: Collaborate effectively with strategists, client service, delivery, writers, developers, and fellow designers to push ideas further and make the work better.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</p>\n<ul>\n<li>Proven Craft: A strong portfolio showing exceptional craftsmanship, sharp concepts, and a growing range across brand and digital work.</li>\n<li>Visual Storytelling: A conceptual thinker who designs with meaning and intent, grounding ideas in the why and bringing them to life with precision and taste.</li>\n<li>Relevant Experience: 2+ years as a Designer or (Digital) Art Director in an agency or similarly fast-paced creative environment.</li>\n<li>Tool Fluency: Proficient use of Figma and Adobe, with an understanding of motion principles and experience working with AI.</li>\n<li>System Mindset: Experience applying and contributing to scalable visual systems, with an appreciation for both the big picture and the details.</li>\n<li>Multidisciplinary Range: Eager to develop and apply skills across brand identity, campaign art direction, and digital product design.</li>\n<li>Clear Persuasion: Clear communicator, able to articulate design ideas effectively to internal teams and keen to develop presentation skills for wider audiences.</li>\n<li>Cultural Curiosity: Actively engaged with design, art direction, culture, technology, and emerging trends, with an interest in AI and its creative potential.</li>\n<li>Adaptive Energy: Flexible and resilient, ready to embrace evolving briefs, new challenges, and change.</li>\n<li>Can-Do Mindset: Proactive, solution-oriented, and positive, with a genuine drive to learn, grow, and make better work.</li>\n</ul>\n<p>Explore our extensive range of benefits <a href=\"https://www.akqa.com/studios/amsterdam/benefits\">here</a>.</p><div><p><span>We believe great work happens when we're together, apiJob.description: <p>The Creative team at AKQA applies artistry and craftsmanship to strategic insight, bringing to life beautiful and technologically innovative ideas that move the world. From diverse backgrounds and disciplines, our creatives are innately curious and strive to transform client challenges into groundbreaking, design-led solutions.</p>\n<p>As a Senior Art Director in our Amsterdam studio, you will play a key role in crafting visually striking concepts and executions across CGI, motion design, and interactive media. With a strong foundation in art direction and production craft, you will collaborate with specialised CGI artists and cross-disciplinary teams to create cinematic, technically precise, and emotionally resonant work.</p>\n<p>From large-scale digital platforms and motion-led brand systems to experimental storytelling powered by emerging tools, you will help push the boundaries of digital creativity — delivering world-class craft while contributing to strong conceptual foundations.</p>\n<p>You will report to the Creative Director and work closely with Design and Production leads to bring ideas to (DaVinci), and emerging AI generation tools.<br><br></li>\n</ul>\n<p>&nbsp;</p>\n<p><strong>QUALITIES AND CHARACTERISTICS</strong></p>\n<ul>\n<li>Proven experience as a Senior Art Director or in a apiJob.title: Creative Team (Art Director & Copywriter) Sao Paulo
apiJob.description: R/GA, Marketing AgencyCreative Team (Art Director & Copywriter) Sao PauloSHAREXLINKEDINEMAILCreative Team - Art Director & Copywriter About R/GA R/GA is a global digital innovation agency specializing in digital product development, brand transformation, media, and communications for major companies. We are on a mission to help companies grow by enabling them to change—across their business, the experience they offer, and the campaigns that take them to market. Our work blends what we call Stories and Systems: narrative and design, technology and interface working together. R/GA is a brand, but also a collective of atypical outsiders and misfits who drive everything we do through bold creativity and bright, strategic thinking. About the Role R/GA is searching for a creative team - Art Director & Copywriter - who together deliver world-class ideas that push the boundaries of creativity. You’re fluent in concepting as a team and collaborating with others. You know how to turn insights into powerful ideas and bring them to life through impeccable craft, whether in words, visuals, or integrated experiences. You’re big on big ideas, comfortable selling them to clients. You're endlessly curious, inventive, and at ease working across formats, channels, and technologies. Our creative teams think broadly—about culture, behavior, platforms, and emerging tech. They craft brand stories and systems, and connect people with brands through work that’s original, unexpected, strategic, and always on brand. On any given day you might - Concept and collaborate as a team (AD + CW) and with other creatives including designers, strategists, creative directors, technologists, and project managers.. - Develop campaign platforms and translate them into integrated executions across channels—film, social, digital ecosystems, product experiences, activations, content, and more. - Craft world-class copy (CW) and world-class visual expressions (AD): from headlines and scripts to design systems, art direction, and layouts. - Explore and apply new technologies, from AI tools to emerging platforms, in the service of idea development and execution. - Work closely with creative leadership from the NY office to ensure concepts are on brand and strategically grounded. - Partner with project managers to ensure deliverables are on time, on budget, and aligned with client expectations. - Present ideas to clients at all levels with clarity, conviction, and a strong creative point of view. - Guide and mentor junior talent, fostering a collaborative and high-performing creative culture. The Ideal Team - A portfolio demonstrating conceptual strength and the ability to produce innovative, award-winning work across channels. - Work that shows outstanding craft—writing craft (CW) and design/visual craft (AD). - Curiosity, passion for digital media, and an interest in emerging tech such as AI, platform innovation, and new creative tools. - The ability to juggle multiple projects and maintain quality under pressure. - Strong collaboration and communication skills—able to accept feedback, iterate, and elevate ideas together. - A desire to build brands, solve business problems creatively, and produce work that earns attention and results. - Marketing sense and an understanding of how campaign platforms work across systems and touchpoints. You Bring - A portfolio showcasing stories + systems thinking and strong idea-to-execution capabilities. - 3 to 6 years of experience working at world-class agencies and/or on global brands. - Ability to collaborate seamlessly across departments (strategy, tech, PM, production, media). - Fluency with writing tools (CW) and design/execution platforms (AD). - Strong ideation and presentation skills that convince, sell, and inspire. - Proficiency in English (written & verbal). - Academic background in Advertising, Communications, Design, Copywriting, or equivalent experience.

apiJob.title: Senior Experience Designer / Hybrid / onsite in LondonLondon
apiJob.description: R/GA, Marketing AgencySenior Experience Designer / Hybrid / onsite in LondonLondonSHAREXLINKEDINEMAIL R/GA EMEA Senior Experience Designer Location: London / Hybrid About R/GA R/GA is an independent creative innovation company built for the intelligence age. We harness the power of design and technology to create more valuable experiences for people and brands. From reimagining interfaces with AI to launching entirely new platforms and services, we help organisations adapt to what’s next and shape what comes after. Our teams combine craft, curiosity and technology to deliver work that drives both business and human impact. At R/GA, we don’t just respond to change — we help shape it. The Role This is a craft-driven role for someone who can confidently tackle today’s experience design challenges while helping shape the interfaces of the future. It’s about designing experiences that are intuitive, intelligent and inclusive, grounded in solid UX principles and open to evolution. Experimentation is essential; we’re looking for someone who questions convention, embraces emerging technologies and contributes to defining new standards in an AI-driven world. We’re also looking for people who bring energy and ambition. Designers who care deeply about the craft, get excited by complex problems, and see design as a superpower. You’ll work closely with strategy, technology, creative and client teams to turn insight into innovation. Whether you’re mapping a product journey, prototyping a new interaction, or pushing the limits of what AI tools can do, you’ll bring a clear perspective on how technology can unlock better experiences for people and brands. On any given day you might be Lead the UX design on products, services and platforms across a range of industries Explore how AI-powered interactions (e.g. conversational UIs, generative interfaces, smart automation) can deliver more human experiences Design experiences that evolve and adapt to human interactions Use generative technology and other tools to concept, prototype, and test ideas faster and smarter Translate research into clear user flows, wireframes, and design systems Collaborate with visual designers, strategists, technologists and clients to shape the work Facilitate workshops and collaborative working sessions Present and rationalise design decisions to internal teams and external stakeholders Contribute to how we build, lead and evolve design teams at R/GA You’d be the right fit if you Are curious about what’s next for UX and see AI as a key part of that evolution Have experience launching digital products or services that put people first Bring a clear, structured approach to problem-solving Have the ability to turn creative concepts into clear, actionable design Think in systems and patterns, not just screens Are comfortable working in an agile, collaborative, fast-moving environment Can clearly articulate your ideas, rationale and ambition Are excited to experiment with AI-powered design tools, and build your own Have a strong sense of craft, care about the details, and take pride in making things better You bring 4+ years of experience in UX, product, service or interaction design A portfolio that shows thoughtful, real-world design solutions and the thinking behind them Mastery of Figma, Miro, Google Workspace and other prototyping and collaborative tools Strong prototyping skills with the ability to quickly bring ideas to life and explore interactions at different levels of fidelity Hands-on experience with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, ElevenLabs, GitHub Copilot, or your own custom stack A track record of using AI in your design process, whether through prototyping, testing, or building internal tools A solid understanding of interaction design principles, accessibility, and inclusive design A drive to contribute to the culture of a progressive, multidisciplinary team Diversity Everyone is welcome at R/GA, and we are committed to empowering our talent to bring their authentic self to work. If you have any requests or requirements to support you throughout the interview process, please let us know.

We are on a mission to help companies grow by enabling them to change, across their business, the experience they offer and the campaigns that take them to market. Our work tends to be a fusion of what we call Stories and Systems: the narrative and the design, technology and the interface working together. R/GA is a brand but it's also a collective of atypical outsiders and misfits who drive everything we do through bold creativity and bright, strategic thinking.About the roleOur Designers are makers and storytellers that use design to bring ideas to life. They lead projects into uncharted creative territories and create new outcomes. They design fundamentalists, but approach projects with a systems and stories mindset. They identify user needs, interpret client challenges, create innovative concepts and define visual language.We’re looking for a Senior visual designer to join the Marketing and Communications team at R/GA. This person will play an integral role in how R/GA shows up in the world - designing everything from daily Instagram content to quarterly reports and data visualizations for proprietary thought leadership. They will work closely with the Brand Marketing team to define R/GA’s visual identity on owned channels and guide the implementation and evolution of our external and internal brand. Here’s what you should know if you want to be a Senior Designer at R/GA:On any given day you might Execute top quality design work in line with agency standards. Manage the quality of design throughout all phases of a project. Mentor and manage Designers and Junior Designers. Participate constructively in inter-department and cross-service line communications. Work with Creative and Art Directors to ensure design work exceeds client expectations. Explain and articulate design decisions and rationale with confidence. Take an active part in client meetings and presentations. Contribute to the creation and definition of flexible design systems and visual languages. Design and iterate on user interfaces and experiences for websites, landing pages, microsites, digital products, and mobile apps. Collaborate with product teams to integrate seamless UX across digital platforms. Prototype interactive experiences that engage users and drive conversion. The ideal person Has a proven ability to produce cutting edge creative work, and a master-level understanding of design, including typography and layout. Exhibits exceptional communication skills within the agency team and with clients. Has outstanding presentation skills. Can lead a team and mentor junior team members. Must have experience in creating visual interface designs and campaigns for all kinds of brands. Demonstrates a strong portfolio in digital product and experience design, showcasing responsive, intuitive interfaces. Has a deep understanding of user-centered design principles and interactive design trends. You bring 7+ years’ experience designing. Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, or equivalent education and experience. Advanced command of Adobe Creative Suite and Figma. Proficiency in English (Written & Verbal) Excellent written and oral communication skills. Our work tends to be a fusion of what we call Stories and Systems: the narrative and the design, technology and the interface working together. You bring 5+ years’ experience designing. Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, or equivalent education and experience. Advanced command of Adobe Creative Suite, Figma and Keynote. apiJob.title: Senior Art Director - Retail Brand Creative
apiJob.description: Senior Art Director - Retail Brand Creative Back Apply Share Facebook X Email Location: Canada State/Province/City: British Columbia City: Vancouver Business Unit: Store Support Centre (SSC) Time Type: Full-time Back Apply Share Facebook X Email Description & Requirements who we are lululemon is an innovative performance apparel company for yoga, running, training, and other athletic pursuits. Setting the bar in technical fabrics and functional design, we create transformational products and experiences that support people in moving, growing, connecting, and being well. We owe our success to our innovative product, emphasis on stores, commitment to our people, and the incredible connections we make in every community we're in. As a company, we focus on creating positive change to build a healthier, thriving future. In particular, that includes creating an equitable, inclusive and growth-focused environment for our people. about this team Global Retail Design collaborates and co-creates with internal business units to develop, innovate and evolve retail experiential concepts, retail store design, and retail fixture design that embody the unique lululemon experience. The overall team is responsible for the establishment, governance and maintenance of global store design principles, guidelines and prototypical templates to ensure consistent design cues reinforce a strong experiential brand identity. Through clarity, focus and coordination we support the business strategies and elevate the guest experience through retail design innovation. reporting structure, team + peers This role is a direct report into the VP Creative Director, Global Retail Design closely working with the Retail Design ‘Creative Concept’ team as part of the greater Global Retail Design Studio. You will work in close partnership with In-Store Marketing, Global Brand Experience Operations, Retail Brand Experience, Digital Brand Experience, Global Brand Creative, Visual Merchandising, Product, and Regional teams. core responsibilities The Senior Art Director - Retail Brand Creative is responsible for all global creative direction for key launches across windows, in-store touchpoints, and pop-ups/ins aligned to campaign and product storytelling. This role translates brand narratives into compelling physical expressions across our global retail fleet, ensuring every activation is emotionally resonant, commercially impactful, and locally executable at scale. You will develop experiential and engaging creative concepts that excite and delight the guest of today and tomorrow, from street to key store touchpoints, as well as evergreen solutions for our fleet of stores. Acting as the connector between campaign concept and retail realization, this leader ensures cohesive storytelling across windows, store touchpoints, and key moments throughout the year. As a new role for the brand, this role requires strong conceptual thinking and storytelling, exceptional ability to set the direction of intent, onboard teams and leaders, and the ability to guide creative from initial vision through to prototyping and global rollout. Balancing craft with operational realities, the Senior Art Director elevates the in-store brand experience while driving clarity, consistency, and innovation across markets. a day in the life Lead creative oversight of windows, in-store touchpoints, and ideation on key product destination architecture to inspire guests with our product and brand message and drive revenue Elevate global retail creative output across key launch podiums in the physical realm, identity, and pop-ups (omni experience) Define creative strategy across activities and platforms working closely with cross-functional teammates across Brand Creative, Product, Strategy, Retail, and regional teams Develop best-in-class creative process and resource strategies for projects based on business strategy and roadmap including budgets for annual operating plan (AOP) Identify creative retail opportunities leveraging localization in key markets Manage and direct tier 1 and tier 2 global creative agencies and external partners Use market insights, consumer trends and competitive landscape to support creative strategies Lead inclusive, energizing pin-ups and creative crits that inspire teams and expand creative horizons Explore innovative materials and sustainable design solutions that advance the brand’s wellbeing and sustainability goals Present concepts and ideas to senior leadership, including C-suite and regional executives Attract, develop, and mentor top creative talent globally as well as source and lead agencies, freelancers, and specialists qualifications 10+ years of related experience in 3D visual and/or creative design A bachelor’s degree in interior design, industrial design, or a relevant field; an advanced degree is a plus Track record of leading a high-performing team of creatives Client-side experience as well as proven experience collaborating and managing global agencies Experience gathering insights and market data to inform creative decision making must haves Acknowledge the presence of choice in every moment and take personal responsibility for your life. Possess an entrepreneurial spirit and continuously innovate to achieve great results. Communicate with honesty and kindness and create the space for others to do the same. Lead with courage, knowing the possibility of greatness is bigger than the fear of failure. Foster connection by putting people first and building trusting relationships. Integrate fun and joy as a way of being and working, aka doesn’t take yourself too seriously. additional notes Immigration support is potentially available for this role. compensation and benefits package lululemon’s compensation offerings are grounded in a pay-for-performance philosophy that recognizes exceptional individual and team performance. The typical hiring range for this position is from $130,800 – $171,700 annually; the base pay offered is based on market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, experience, and internal equity. As part of our total rewards offering, permanent employees in this position may be eligible for our competitive annual bonus program and, subject to program eligibility requirements. At lululemon, investing in our people is a top priority. We believe that when life works, work works. We strive to be the place where inclusive leaders come to develop and enable all to be well. Recognizing our teams for their performance and dedication, other components of our total rewards offerings include support of career development, wellbeing, and personal growth: Extended health and dental benefits, and mental health plans Paid time off Savings and retirement plan matching Generous employee discount Fitness & yoga classes Parenthood top-up Extensive catalog of development course offerings People networks, mentorship programs, and leadership series (to name a few) Note: The incentive programs, benefits, and perks have certain eligibility requirements. The Company reserves the right to alter these incentive programs, benefits, and perks in whole or in part at any time without advance notice. workplace arrangement This role is classified as In-Person under our SSC Workplace Policy: In-person collaboration and/or office-based work is necessary or important for the role. Work is mainly performed onsite, 4-5 days per week depending on role requirements. #LI-Onsite #LI-KB2 Apply Now Only those applicants under consideration will be contacted. Please accept our utmost appreciation for your interest. Lululemon is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. Employment decisions are based on merit and business needs, and not on race, color, creed, age, sex, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, religion, marital status, medical condition, physical or mental disability, military service, pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions or any other classification protected by federal, state or provincial and local laws and ordinances. Reasonable accommodation is available for qualified individuals with disabilities, upon request. This Equal Employment Opportunity policy applies to all practices relating to recruitment and hiring, compensation, benefits, discipline, transfer, termination and all other terms and conditions of employment. While management is primarily responsible for seeing that Lululemon equal employment opportunity policies are implemented, you share in the responsibility for assuring that, by your personal actions, the policies are effective. lululemon is committed to providing reasonable accommodation to applicants with disabilities. If you would like someone from our team to contact you for individualized support, email us ataccommodations@lululemon.com . In your email, please include the position title, the location of the position and the nature of your request. The use of AI tools, including but not limited to ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Gemini, DeepSeek, or any other AI-assisted software, is strictly prohibited during the interview process. This includes, AI-generated responses, content creation, or any form of automated assistance in live interviews, case studies, technical assessments, or written submissions. At lululemon, we are committed to privacy, integrity, transparency, and ethical hiring practices. Our commitment to responsible AI ensures that proprietary information is protected and that all hiring decisions are based on an individual’s own skills, judgment, and expertise without AI assistance. Any use of AI during the interview process will result in immediate disqualification. lululemon reserves the right to use AI detection tools to verify the authenticity of candidate responses.
