apiJob.title: Skip to main content
apiJob.description: JobsThe key to your futureDo you dream of helping to create a better everyday life for the many people? You’re in the right place! Play video of a revolving Allen key. Whether you're just starting out in a new career, or simply looking for your next challenge, looking for a new job can be as daunting as assembling your first flatpack furniture. Working at IKEA is about so much more than home furnishing. Together, we strive to have a positive impact on the world – from where we source our materials to enabling our customers live a more sustainable life at home. Could IKEA be the key to your future? Let's find out.Come and join us!At IKEA, you can do what you do best, or try something completely new. After all, we're always evolving, and so can you. Your role might grow, shift, or take you anywhere in the world. Ready to explore the possibilities?Explore available jobs Opportunities at IKEAA glorious future for your careerAre you comfortable being yourself and planning your own journey? Then you might want to work with us at one of our IKEA stores, development centres, factories, distribution facilities, studios or office hubs. Across the many IKEA companies, you'll join over 200,000 IKEA co-workers along what we call our ‘value chain’. Every IKEA product is imagined, prototyped, produced, transported, managed and marketed through this chain to reach our customers. You could work anywhere along the way, from creating, making and moving products, to meeting customers in-store or online, or even designing digital solutions (like drone deliveries!). And don’t forget IKEA Food. Someone’s got to serve those meatballs!Read more about opportunities at IKEALife at IKEA216,000 heads are better than 1At IKEA, we're one big ‘we’. Anyone can chip in with an idea, bringing their unique talents and experience to work. And there's so much more. We look out for each other, sit down together as co-workers to see how we can worker better and smarter. We don't just settle for the way things are, we question and even rebel against them, for the better. That’s why we're always looking for people who think differently.Read more about how we work together "One of the things that I love about my job is that I don't like to do the same thing over and over again – I love change, and I think at IKEA, we are constantly changing." Antonia Banuelos-Leon, Amplification Manager Read more from our co-workersMore than just a job Swedish roots, global spiritAlthough our roots are planted deeply in the forests of southern Sweden, the IKEA Brand unites thousands of co-workers and hundreds of companies within our organisation globally. The retail business is organised in a franchise system with 12 franchisee groups in 63 markets. Diverse and inclusiveWe believe everyone has the right to be treated fairly and be given equal opportunities, regardless of their gender, age, physical ability, ethnicity, religion or any other dimension of their identity. Stay... and grow!Lots of our coworkers stay with IKEA for years, growing from job to job. Some stay in the same IKEA location, while others choose to move to a different area, taking on new challenges, at home or abroad. Balance and wellbeingYou're an important part of our playful, inclusive culture and together we nurture a work environment that supports us to make healthy everyday choices. Conditions in different countries vary, but our offer is built on the same global principle: we care about people. Welcome to ÄlmhultThe Swedish birthplace of IKEASince IKEA was first founded here 80 years ago, Älmhult – a small town in the forests of southern Sweden – has remained the beating heart of all things IKEA. Get to know the place where it all began, and see what life is like here today.Read more about all things ÄlmhultInteract with IKEALet’s stay in touchThinking of applying for a job at IKEA, or just curious to see what we’re up to? Find out more about our recruitment process, applying for internships, and connecting with the IKEA brand online.Read more about interacting with IKEA

apiJob.title: Senior Product Design Manager, Buyer Desktop and Mobile Web
apiJob.description:
Company Description
Etsy is the global marketplace for unique and creative goods. We build, power, and evolve the tools and technologies that connect millions of entrepreneurs with millions of buyers around the world. As an Etsy Inc. employee, whether a team member of Etsy or Depop, you will tackle unique, meaningful, and large-scale problems alongside passionate coworkers, all the while making a rewarding impact and Keeping Commerce Human.

Salary Range:

$204,000.00 - $266,000.00

What’s the role?

As the Senior Product Design Manager for Buyer Web, you will lead the design strategy and execution for Etsy’s desktop and mobile web experiences. This team crafts how buyers discover, evaluate, and purchase unique items every day — making the shopping journey intuitive, cohesive, and high-performing across platforms.

You’ll guide a team responsible for delivering a consistent, “One Etsy” buyer experience while navigating platform-specific constraints, evolving web architecture, and responsive design systems. This role requires expertise in web UX, systems thinking, and the ability to bring clarity to sophisticated and ambiguous problem spaces as we continue refining Etsy’s core shopping journey.

This is a highly collaborative leadership role reporting into Buyer Design leadership and partnering closely with Product, Engineering, Research, Brand, and Design Systems.

This is a full-time position reporting to the Sr. Director of Product Design, Growth. In addition to salary, you will also be eligible for an equity package, an annual performance bonus, and our competitive benefits that support you and your family as part of your total rewards package at Etsy.

For this role, we are considering candidates based in the United States. Candidates living within commutable distance of Etsy’s Brooklyn Office Hub may be the first to be considered. For candidates within commutable distance, Etsy requires in-office attendance once or twice per week depending on your proximity to the office. Etsy offers different work modes to meet the variety of needs and preferences of our team. Learn more details about our work modes and workplace safety policies here

What’s this team like at Etsy?

The Buyer Web team focuses on the heart of the customer journey — discovery, evaluation, and purchase on desktop and mobile web. We work at the intersection of craft and performance, ensuring that Etsy’s marketplace feels inspiring, trustworthy, fast, and seamless.

We value clarity, collaboration, and thoughtful execution. Our culture encourages experimentation, continuous learning, and strong cross-functional partnership. We believe phenomenal web experiences balance creativity with rigor — delivering measurable business impact while staying true to Etsy’s human-centered brand.

What does the day-to-day look like?

Product Design Managers at Etsy partner closely with Product Management and Engineering to drive measurable customer and business outcomes. They are responsible for shaping strategy, elevating craft quality, developing design talent, and aligning collaborators around a clear and actionable product vision.

  • Lead with Strategy - Define and drive initiative-level design strategies across desktop and mobile web, anticipating platform tradeoffs, technical constraints, and performance considerations while ensuring cohesive buyer experiences.

  • Bring Clarity to Complexity - Navigate evolving architecture, responsive systems, and shifting priorities. Frame ambiguous problem spaces into clear opportunities grounded in user insights and business goals.

  • Grow and Support Your Team - Coach designers through complex initiatives and platform migrations. Develop a high-trust, inclusive environment with clear expectations around quality, accessibility, craft excellence, and performance-oriented design.

  • Champion Craft & Systems Thinking - Partner with Brand and Design Systems to ensure web components are accessible, performant, and scalable across the buyer lifecycle. Drive consistency while enabling innovation.

  • Collaborate Strategically - Work closely with Product, Engineering, and Research leadership to translate technical considerations into actionable design direction and long-term roadmap alignment.

  • Drive Measurable Impact - Use qualitative and quantitative insights to improve buyer confidence, conversion, engagement, and overall marketplace performance.

  • Of course, this is a sample of the kinds of work this role will require. Responsibilities may evolve over time in alignment with business needs and applicable law.

Qualities that will help you thrive in this role are:

You are a thoughtful design leader who balances craft with strategy, clarity with adaptability, and vision with execution. You thrive in complex environments and are motivated by building web experiences that serve millions of people.

We’re looking for someone with:

  • Experience leading the design of large-scale ecommerce or consumer web experiences from discovery through delivery

  • Strong systems thinking and deep expertise in responsive web UX and platform-specific constraints

  • A proven ability to define ambiguous problem spaces and drive evidence-based solutions with measurable outcomes

  • Experience mentoring and developing designers, setting clear performance expectations, and supporting continuous growth

  • A strong understanding of accessibility, performance, and scalable design systems in web environments

  • Excellent communication and storytelling skills, with the ability to align senior stakeholders around tradeoffs and long-term vision

Additional Information

What's Next
If you're interested in joining the team at Etsy, please share your resume with us and feel free to include a cover letter if you'd like. As we hope you've seen already, Etsy is a place that values individuality and variety. We don't want you to be like everyone else -- we want you to be like you! So tell us what you're all about.

Our Promise
At Etsy, we believe that a diverse, equitable and inclusive workplace furthers relevance, resilience, and longevity. We encourage people from all backgrounds, ages, abilities, and experiences to apply. Etsy is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. If, due to a disability, you need an accommodation during any part of the application or interview process, please let your recruiter know. While Etsy supports visa sponsorship, sponsorship opportunities may be limited to certain roles and skills.

apiJob.description: Flexibility is deeply rooted in our values and culture. We offer hybrid, remote, and onsite workstyles to our employees. You’ll find eBay offices in major cities worldwide. Our diverse workforce fuels our passion for innovation and collaboration. From Engineering to Customer Service, we have opportunities in more than a dozen categories to match your experience, interests, and ambitions. We exist to connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all. Our culture is how we bring that purpose to life. Check out our exciting global career opportunities for students and recent graduates. eBay is committed to your physical, mental, and financial well-being. Learn about all the benefits available in your country. Workplace Awards & Recognition In 2026, Glassdoor recognized eBay as Top 100 Best Places to Work and Top 25 Best Places to Work in Tech & AI. What Our People Say This role provides me the opportunity to challenge myself with rotations across the Finance org that ​​​​​​​give insight to many parts of the business. Working remote, it’s been possible to make different connections, and inclusivity has been much more prevalent. I appreciate the element of community at eBay. At the end of the day, we are all here for each other.​​​​​​​ What attracted me to eBay was its purpose and mission, and it’s why I love working here every day.​​​​​​​ Follow our social media accounts for the latest updates on what's happening at eBay. Our goal is simple: to help you have the best hiring experience possible.As our hiring practices evolve, we’ll continue to update this page to reflect how we use AI thoughtfully and responsibly, so you always know what to expect along the way. Join us Your engaging footer subtitle goes here. Learn more Learn more about the hiring process at eBay Your engaging subtitle goes here. This text should capture attention and provide a brief overview of engaging content that awaits users in this widget. Learn more Apply Start your eBay journeyYour first step toward joining eBay begins with your application. Whether you find the role on our Careers Site, through a job board, a recruiter, or a referral, this is your chance to tell us why you’re excited about what we do and how your experience connects.What to expectApplication decisions are made by real people, AI simply helps organize application information so our teams can review it efficiently.Some roles include a short questionnaire or assessment upfront.In certain regions or programs, you might apply through a partner platform that connects to eBay’s system.Tips to feel preparedMake sure your résumé clearly highlights your impact & what you accomplished, not just what you did.Tailor your application to show how your skills connect to the role.Keep it honest and authentic, we want to meet the real you.If you’re using AI tools, let them refine your resume, not define your story.How does AI show up?While AI doesn’t directly play a role in your application submission, we use it behind the scenes to help our recruiting teams review applications more efficiently by organizing information and highlighting key details relevant to the job description. Interview Let’s get to know each otherInterviews are a two-way conversation. They help us understand your skills and experiences, and they help you learn what makes eBay unique. Most interviews happen virtually via Zoom and may include a few stages, depending on the role.What to expectDuring your interviews, you’ll likely meet with a recruiter, the hiring manager, and potential future teammates.Depending on the role you’re interviewing for, you may need to complete a technical screen, case study, or skills-based exercise.For engineering roles, you may complete a coding assessment; for customer experience roles, a short online assessment. Tips to feel preparedTest your technology early if you’re interviewing virtually.Review eBay’s culture, we love when candidates connect their work to our mission.Prepare real examples that show how you approach challenges and collaborate with others.Bring your authentic self, we care as much about who you are as what you know.Use AI to practice or prepare for sessions, not during interviews or assessments. Decision How we evaluateAfter interviews, our teams come together to reflect on your skills, experiences, and potential. Objective feedback from each interviewer is reviewed carefully.What to expectInterviewers share structured feedback to help ensure a consistent review process.For some roles, a hiring panel or debrief may be held to reach a decision.Recruiters aim to keep communication transparent and timely, though timelines can vary. Tips to feel preparedIf you haven’t heard back yet, it doesn’t mean the decision is final.Many roles involve multiple conversations.Keep engaging with your recruiter; they’re your best point of contact. Offer Let’s make it officialWhen it’s time to extend an offer, your recruiter will reach out to share the details and celebrate the good news. Compensation, benefits, and start dates may vary by role and region, but we’ll guide you through each step.What to expectYou’ll receive a verbal offer before receiving your official offer letter.In some regions, notice periods may be longer. Your recruiter will help you plan timing.For certain roles, background checks or verifications may be required before onboarding.Tips to feel confidentAsk questions, your recruiter is there to help you understand every detail.Once you accept, our People Experience team will help you prepare for day one.Take a moment to celebrate, you’ve earned it! apiJob.title: Part-Time Seasonal Editor (Sales Associate), Boston
apiJob.description: Back to jobsPart-Time Seasonal Editor (Sales Associate), BostonBoston, MAApplyOverview We are a people-powered beauty ecosystem, leveraging unique and engaging online and offline experiences as well as consumer participation to fuel our growth. In 10 years, we have built an iconic brand that has revolutionized how consumers, and how the industry, think of beauty. The foundational DNA of our brand is resonant across generations, timeless, and ripe for building upon. Our next step is to bring Glossier to more people in more places. We are inclusive, customer-devoted, curious, courageous, discerning, and results-driven. Our store teams operate in environments fueled by our people-first employee experience philosophy rooted in authenticity, integrity, inclusion, equity, and empathy. As an Editor, it is your job to ensure the customer experience lives through with our product, its presentation, packaging, and care. Driven by an authentic desire to collaborate and engage with others, you will inspire and create exceptional experiences for our customers as they discover and deepen their connection with our brand through our products - whether in-store, picking up an online order, or processing a return or exchange. As an avid team player, you will collaborate with all members of the store team to ensure every customer touchpoint throughout their experience is cohesive and seamless. Known for being optimistic and able to find joy with everyday interactions, you will help set the tone for the overall culture within the store team - joy is our language! Editors will be part of a team of impassioned storytellers, driven by curiosity and the power of the Glossier community, reimagining the future of beauty one experience at a time. As part of the store’s team, you will be fully immersed in every aspect of our customers’ journeys as they visit our stores. Therefore, as an Editor, you will be trained in all aspects of the store operation, including our customer-facing and back-of-house operations. You will assist with coverage and will be equipped to work in both environments, front and back of the house. Having a holistic understanding of the customer journey, from start to finish, will strengthen our team’s abilities when assisting customers with any and all inquiries - with leadership guidance and support as needed. Performance expectations include but are not limited to the following: Customer Experience Model and coach Glossier’s customer experience principles, ensuring consistently memorable and inspiring experiences. Embody our core values of Devoted to the Customer, Inclusive, Courageous, Curious, Discerning, and Results-Driven in everything you do. Become an expert on the entire portfolio of products, with an active working knowledge on product basics, key benefits, application, formula, customer recommendations, and care. Fulfill customer order requests in an expeditious, thoughtful, branded, and accurate manner. Develop and nurture relationships with repeat customers, frequently engaging them pre and post visits (communication on promotional events, follow-up on purchases, just checking in!). Master all of our customer service expectations, following our training fundamentals, becoming an exemplary Editor and advisor to new team members. Monitor customer feedback, working with your store’s leadership team, to share information with key stakeholders accordingly. Become a brand ambassador, fully versed in all aspects of the Glossier brand and experience! Teamwork Operate with optimism and joy— having fun is not only allowed, it’s encouraged! Be a safety champion for all! Safely completing all work responsibilities and ensuring the work environment is free of safety hazards, immediately reporting any concerns to management when applicable. Partner with store leadership to effectively communicate feedback on inventory logistics, packaging, and customer feedback regarding their physical experience with our products. Serve as a product guru and an added resource for product demonstrations (e.g., to our guests and new hires, cross-training team members on new product launches), in partnership with store leadership. Outstanding collaborator, able to partner with all members of the leadership and store team in the fulfillment of special projects and/or assignments. Operational Excellence Adherence to safety standards (e.g., COVID-19) as defined by the store leadership team in accordance with public health guidelines, federal, and state guidelines. Restock and replenish inventory in accordance with business and operational standards by leveraging the expertise of inventory management systems, inventory reporting, and store logistics. Focus on inventory accuracy, following a meticulous, yet expeditious, mindset when fulfilling customer orders. Carefully receive, manage, and inspect shipment deliveries to ensure accuracy and quality, and diligently report discrepancies accordingly. Active participant in visual projects (e.g., new display activations, floor moves, product launches, brand events, etc.). Uphold all uniform standards, closely following presentation guidelines. Become an expert in all operational procedures of the store, both front and back of house, with a focus on providing support to newly hired team members. Observe strict confidentiality, particularly as it pertains to handling sensitive information (such as credit card data, customer information). Skillful multitasker, able to accommodate multiple customer requests at a time without compromising service standards of excellence. Qualifications 2+ years of experience in a fast-paced customer service operation, such as retail or hospitality environment, is preferred. Prior experience, in an advisory or sales capacity, within the beauty/skincare space is preferred. Ability to work a flexible schedule, including evenings, weekends, and bank holidays is required. Passion for creating memorable experiences through meaningful personal interactions. An advocate for all members of our community, promoting inclusion and belonging always. Demonstrated ability to show empathy and understanding while still driving action. Driven by operational excellence, understanding the logistics of a retail operation in order for the customer experience to be one that is operationally seamless and memorable. Desire and willingness to roll up your sleeves and jump in when the situation requires it. A true collaborator in nature, driven by the power of teamwork, who thrives in group settings. Positive, willing to learn and grow, and motivated to perform in fast-paced environments. Highly adaptable with an impeccable ability to multitask. Prior experience with POS (point of sale) or inventory management systems is a plus. Click here to view the candidate privacy policy under FAQ's We are an Equal Employment Opportunity (“EEO”) Employer. It has been and will continue to be a fundamental policy of Glossier not to discriminate on the basis of race, color, creed, religion, gender, gender identity, pregnancy, marital status, partnership status, domestic violence victim status, sexual orientation, age, national origin, alienage or citizenship status, veteran or military status, disability, medical condition, genetic information, caregiver status, unemployment status or any other characteristic prohibited by federal, state and/or local laws. This policy applies to all aspects of employment, including hiring, promotion, demotion, compensation, training, working conditions, transfer, job assignment, benefits, layoff, and termination.

Embody our core values of Devoted to the Customer, Inclusive, Courageous, Curious, Discerning, and Results-Driven in everything you do. Become an expert on the entire portfolio of products, with an active working knowledge on product basics, key benefits, application, formula, customer recommendations, and care. Fulfill customer order requests in an expeditious, thoughtful, branded, and accurate manner. Develop and nurture relationships with repeat customers, frequently engaging them pre and post visits (communication on promotional events, follow-up on purchases, just checking in!). Master all of our customer service expectations, following our training fundamentals, becoming an exemplary Editor and advisor to new team members. Monitor customer feedback, working with your store’s leadership team, to share information with key stakeholders accordingly. Become a brand ambassador, fully versed in all aspects of the Glossier brand and experience! Teamwork Operate with optimism and joy— having fun is not only allowed, it’s encouraged! Be a safety champion for all! Safely completing all work responsibilities and ensuring the work environment is free of safety hazards, immediately reporting any concerns to management when applicable. Partner with store leadership to effectively communicate feedback on inventory logistics, packaging, and customer feedback regarding their physical experience with our products. Serve as a product guru and an added resource for product demonstrations (e.g., to our guests and new hires, cross-training team members on new product launches), in partnership with store leadership. Outstanding collaborator, able to partner with all members of the leadership and store team in the fulfillment of special projects and/or assignments. Operational Excellence Adherence to safety standards (e.g., COVID-19) as defined by the store leadership team in accordance with public health guidelines, federal, and state guidelines. Restock and replenish inventory in accordance with business and operational standards by leveraging the expertise of inventory management systems, inventory reporting, and store logistics. Focus on inventory accuracy, following a meticulous, yet expeditious, mindset when fulfilling customer orders. Carefully receive, manage, and inspect shipment deliveries to ensure accuracy and quality, and diligently report discrepancies accordingly. Active participant in visual projects (e.g., new display activations, floor moves, product launches, brand events, etc.). Uphold all uniform standards, closely following presentation guidelines. Become an expert in all operational procedures of the store, both front and back of house, with a focus on providing support to newly hired team members. Observe strict confidentiality, particularly as it pertains to handling sensitive information (such as credit card data, customer information). Skillful multitasker, able to accommodate multiple customer requests at a time without compromising service standards of excellence. Qualifications 2+ years of experience in a fast-paced customer service operation, such as retail or hospitality environment, is preferred. Prior experience, in an advisory or sales capacity, within the beauty/skincare space is preferred. Ability to work a flexible schedule, including evenings, weekends, and bank holidays is required. Passion for creating memorable experiences through meaningful personal interactions. An advocate for all members of our community, promoting inclusion and belonging always. Demonstrated ability to show empathy and understanding while still driving action. Driven by operational excellence, understanding the logistics of a retail operation in order for the customer experience to be one that is operationally seamless and memorable. Desire and willingness to roll up your sleeves and jump in when the situation requires it. A true collaborator in nature, driven by the power of teamwork, who thrives in group settings. Positive, willing to learn and grow, and motivated to perform in fast-paced environments. Highly adaptable with an impeccable ability to multitask. Prior experience with POS (point of sale) or inventory management systems is a plus. Click here to view the candidate privacy policy under FAQ's We are an Equal Employment Opportunity (“EEO”) Employer. It has been and will continue to be a fundamental policy of Glossier not to discriminate on the basis of race, color, creed, religion, gender, gender identity, pregnancy, marital status, partnership status, domestic violence victim status, sexual orientation, age, national origin, alienage or citizenship status, veteran or military status, disability, medical condition, genetic information, caregiver status, unemployment status or any other characteristic prohibited by federal, state and/or local laws. This policy applies to all aspects of employment, including hiring, promotion, demotion, compensation, training, working conditions, transfer, job assignment, benefits, layoff, and termination.

apiJob.title: Video Editor, Digital Designer
apiJob.description: Back to jobsNewVideo Editor, Digital DesignerNew York, NYApplyOverview We are a people-powered beauty ecosystem, leveraging unique and engaging online and offline experiences as well as consumer participation to fuel our growth. In 11 years, we have built an iconic brand that has revolutionized how consumers, and how the industry, think of beauty. The foundational DNA of our brand is resonant across generations, timeless, and ripe for building upon. Our next step is to bring Glossier to more people in more places. This role is for a digital designer + video editor who thinks like a storyteller. You’ll lead the design and execution of short-form video content + digital assets that translates brand strategy into cohesive digital experiences across paid ads, social content, campaigns, and web. With a strong point of view on performance-driven creative, you’ll design assets optimized for modern platforms while maintaining a premium, consistent brand expression. Partnering closely with Brand, Creative, and cross-functional Marketing, you’ll ensure every frame, transition, layout, and motion detail feels intentional and on brand. From concept through execution, you’ll shape how the brand shows up online and build scalable content systems that support what comes next. Six Month Expectations In the first six months, you’ll be focused on ramping up, building trust, and shipping work: Get deeply fluent in the brand’s visual language, tone, and creative standards across social, campaigns, and digital Edit short-form video content across Reels, TikTok, YouTube, and web Collaborate closely with Brand Creative, Marketing, CRM, and Retention on concepts, execution, and delivery Contribute ideas to content calendars, platform strategy, and campaign storytelling Learn how content performance is measured and begin applying insights to creative decisions Help organize and maintain content libraries, templates, and workflows to support consistency and scale Twelve+ Month Expectations As you grow with the team, you’ll take on greater creative ownership and influence: Serve as a key creative voice shaping how the brand shows up across platforms Set and elevate the bar for video craft, storytelling, and visual consistency Proactively introduce new formats, trends, and technologies to evolve our content Partner closely with Marketing and CRM to balance brand expression with performance insights Help refine content strategy, systems, and guidelines as the brand scales Contribute to the long-term creative vision of the brand Qualifications 3–5+ years of experience digital design + video editing for social, digital, or brand campaigns, ideally within a fashion, beauty, or premium consumer space A strong portfolio demonstrating concept-led storytelling, editing craft, and visual consistency across short- and long-form content Proficiency in video editing tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, and/or CapCut (in addition to Figma) A strong understanding of visual communication, motion, typography, pacing, and sound design Experience shooting and self-directing content, with a solid grasp of lighting, framing, and audio Fluency in social platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) and an instinct for what resonates culturally and creatively Ability to collaborate cross-functionally, take feedback well, and make thoughtful creative decisions under tight timelines Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple projects in a fast-paced environment Curious, proactive, and excited by new tools, technologies, and evolving creative formats In accordance with the applicable law, the following represents a good faith estimate of the minimum and maximum compensation range for this position: The estimated annual pay range for this role is $70,000 - $83,000. There may be future opportunities for continued pay progression based on continued strong performance in the role. Full-time positions are also eligible for a competitive compensation and benefits package that include medical health insurance, 401K, equity in the form of Restricted Stock Units, Paid Time Off, Short Term and Long Term Disability leave, and a range of other benefits. Learn more at the Glossier Career page. Compensation for the role will be determined based on permissible, non discriminatory factors such as a candidate’s qualifications, skills, and experience. Click here to view the candidate privacy policy under FAQ's We are an Equal Employment Opportunity (“EEO”) Employer. It has been and will continue to be a fundamental policy of Glossier not to discriminate on the basis of race, color, creed, religion, gender, gender identity, pregnancy, marital status, partnership status, domestic violence victim status, sexual orientation, age, national origin, alienage or citizenship status, veteran or military status, disability, medical condition, genetic information, caregiver status, unemployment status or any other characteristic prohibited by federal, state and/or local laws. This policy applies to all aspects of employment, including hiring, promotion, demotion, compensation, training, working conditions, transfer, job assignment, benefits, layoff, and termination. #LI-Hybrid

apiJob.title: Creative Production Stylist
apiJob.description: Back to jobsCreative Production StylistNew York, New YorkApplyOverview At Brooklinen, we’re building the future of comfort — thoughtfully, ambitiously, and with intention — nurturing our customers, our team, and the work that helps us grow thoughtfully. Love interiors? Obsessed with creating visual worlds that bring stories to life? We’re a team of home soft goods experts, creatives, and technologists—brought together by a shared love of creating high-quality bed and bath products at a price people love. And we’re building a brand and customer experience that’s truly memorable. Now, we’re looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Creative Production Stylist with superb taste to join our Creative team. This is a highly collaborative role focused on shaping how our products come to life across campaigns, lifestyle, ecommerce, and product education moments. Our ideal candidate is a strong executor with great taste who can translate product know-how and visual direction into polished, high-quality soft- and prop-styling work. If you love storytelling and brand-building and you want to set a new standard for what home can look like—we’d love to meet you. What You’ll Do In this role, you’ll: Build and refine our soft styling playbook across ecomm photography, lifestyle and product education shoots Partner with our VP Creative, Photo Art Director, and Photographer to bring seasonal campaigns to life Curate props and manage soft goods (and keep them organized for smart reuse) Support prop styling needs by pulling, styling, and returning props, with the ability to combine soft goods and prop styling when needed Style across ecommerce, campaigns, organic social, PR activations, and serve as a close partner to Retail Visual Merchandiser Partner with Creative Production team and Photo AD to prep shot lists, plan assortments, track samples, and make sure every product looks its best Stay close to product details so styling always feels true to our brand Serve as a key partner to Product Design, Merchandising, and Marketing teams to create looks and styling that supports our unique product offering Occasionally support wardrobe pulls and retail styling collabs We’re Looking for Someone Who Brings 5+ years styling experience (home, interiors, lifestyle, or related) An eye that catches every layer, fold, and detail; and deep understanding of how styling plays a key role in overarching storytelling Ability to shift between more scrappy, fast-paced shoots and big, polished productions An exceptional organizational mind to keep sets, props, and samples running smoothly A collaborative mindset — you love working across teams with key collaborators being Creative, Product Design, Merchandising, Marketing, and Retail Passion for interiors, design, and building visual worlds Ability to work on-site in the studio three to four days per week as needed to support creative production and styling priorities. How You Work People who thrive at Brooklinen tend to: • Communicate with warmth and clarity• Work intentionally, without unnecessary complexity• Bring a steady, grounded presence — even amid change• Value partnership over ego• Balance big-picture thinking with attention to detail• Take ownership and pride in their work• Stay open, adaptable, and curious• Contribute to a supportive, inclusive team environment Compensation We believe great work deserves thoughtful, competitive rewards. Base salary range: $85K - $110K (plus equity) Benefits & Perks • Up to 100% medical, dental, and vision coverage (employee-only)• Fertility & family-building support (up to $20K lifetime)• 401(k) with 4% company match• 16 weeks fully paid parental leave• 20 vacation days (25 after 5 years) + year-round Summer Fridays• Hybrid work (2 core in-office days, Tues–Thurs)• Remote Thanksgiving week + last week of December• Up to 4 additional remote weeks/year with approval• 40% employee discount + seasonal product allowance• One Medical, Talkspace, and $1K/year via Joon for wellness• One-month paid sabbatical at 5 years Why Join Us? Brooklinen is a place where thoughtful people do meaningful work — with warmth, clarity, and shared purpose. We value care, collaboration, balance, and continuous growth. If this role excites you, even if you don’t meet every qualification, we encourage you to apply. We believe diverse experiences and perspectives make our team stronger. Our culture has been recognized by LinkedIn Top Startups, Inc.’s Best Workplaces, and Forbes Best Startup Employers, but what matters most is how it feels to work here: grounded, collaborative, and genuinely supportive. About Brooklinen Brooklinen was founded in 2014 with a simple belief: that comfort can bring happiness. Today, we’re one of the largest soft goods brands in the U.S., designing for real life and real homes with products that pair elevated quality and accessible pricing. Our assortment — from sheets and towels to thoughtful additions for the modern bedroom — has earned over 100,000 5-star reviews and recognition from Architectural Digest, Good Housekeeping, Wirecutter, and more. We’re growing thoughtfully, evolving intentionally, and committed to creating a home for people who care deeply about their craft — and each other. Note for recruiting agencies: We oversee hiring internally and kindly ask that agencies refrain from sending unsolicited resumes #LI-Hybrid #LI-MK

apiJob.title: Brand Campaign Manager
apiJob.description: Back to jobsBrand Campaign ManagerLondon, UKApplyLevel Up Your Career with Zynga! At Zynga, we bring people together through the power of play. As a global leader in interactive entertainment and a proud label of Take-Two Interactive, our games have been downloaded over 6 billion times—connecting players in 175+ countries through fun, strategy, and a little friendly competition. From thrilling casino spins to epic strategy battles, mind-bending puzzles, and social word challenges, our diverse game portfolio has something for everyone. Fan-favorites and latest hits include FarmVille™, Words With Friends™, Zynga Poker™, Game of Thrones Slots Casino™, Wizard of Oz Slots™, Hit it Rich! Slots™, Wonka Slots™, Top Eleven™, Toon Blast™, Empires & Puzzles™, Merge Dragons!™, CSR Racing™, Harry Potter: Puzzles & Spells™, Match Factory™, and Color Block Jam™—plus many more! Founded in 2007 and headquartered in California, our teams span North America, Europe, and Asia, working together to craft unforgettable gaming experiences. Whether you're spinning, strategizing, matching, or competing, Zynga is where fun meets innovation—and where you can take your career to the next level. Join us and be part of the play!Position Overview: We are seeking a Manager, Brand Campaign to join our expanding Brand Central business unit. We are looking for a tenacious and proactive manager focused on delivering Brand campaigns across Paid Brand Media across an ever evolving gaming portfolio whilst supporting co-promotional partnerships - driving both brand equity and player growth through integrated, creative, and measurable campaigns. The ideal candidate is a proactive, hands-on marketer with strong media expertise, capable of driving brand equity and player growth through integrated, creative, and measurable campaigns in a fast-paced environment. We embrace a hybrid work environment. Within this role you will work 2 days per week in our London office and the remaining days at home. What You'll Do: Brand Media Strategy & Vision (Primary Focus) Partner with Brand Strategy Lead to define upper- and mid-funnel brand media strategy across portfolio titles. Collaborate with UA leadership to ensure brand media efforts complement and support lower-funnel performance initiatives. Support Consumer Insights initiatives, including testing frameworks, brief development, and content delivery. Identify opportunities to evolve brand storytelling and media approaches across platforms and markets. Brand Media Campaign Execution & Cross-Functional Collaboration Own end-to-end execution of paid Brand Media campaigns, including briefing, timelines, approvals, launch readiness, and post-campaign reporting. Lead day-to-day brand media planning with a hybrid model, working across media agencies and direct platform partners (Google, Meta, TikTok, etc.). Collaborate closely with Brand Studio, UA, Influencer, Creative, Product Marketing, and Live Ops teams to ensure cohesive execution. Serve as day-to-day point of contact with Business Operations for POs, NDAs, and key legal workflows (e.g., new agency onboarding). Ensure all media activity aligns with brand positioning, creative standards, and player experience expectations. Brand Promotional Activations Support (Secondary Focus) Support in executing large-scale brand co-promotions, including in-game, social, paid, and owned-channel activations. Assist with co-promotional partnerships, ensuring strong integration with broader brand media efforts. Contribute to ideation and execution of new activation or integration opportunities across the portfolio. Agency & Partner Management Act as lead point of contact for brand media agencies, briefing and refining proposals in alignment with leadership priorities. Build and maintain strong relationships with agencies and platform partners. Maintain and update Portfolio Games’ Brand Partnership Guidelines and ensure brand safety compliance across campaigns. Measurement, Reporting & Impact Define clear KPIs aligned to campaign objectives; monitor performance and optimize against results. Partner with Marketing Analytics to ensure tracking readiness (e.g., brand lift studies, in-game surveys, tracking tools). Deliver post-campaign reporting with actionable insights and recommendations to inform future brand investments. Knowledge Sharing & Team Contribution Support Leads with internal quarterly updates across the Brand Central division. Contribute to the development of a monthly industry news and trends newsletter. Proactively surface relevant industry changes, platform updates, and emerging marketing trends. What You Bring: 5+ years of experience in general Brand Management or Integrated Marketing Proven experience leading high-impact brand media campaigns, ideally within gaming, entertainment, or consumer tech Strong understanding of upper- and mid-funnel marketing and how it supports performance outcomes Experience collaborating with agencies, platform partners, and cross-functional teams Familiarity with co-marketing partnerships and influencer marketing, or a strong willingness to expand in these areas Understanding of mobile gaming audiences and free-to-play business models Entrepreneurial mindset with comfort operating in ambiguity Excellent communication, presentation (slide decks), and project management skills Bonus Points: Experience in mobile gaming, apps, or entertainment Experience supporting influencer-led or creator-based partnerships Exposure to global campaigns across multiple regions What We Offer You: Competitive salary and discretionary annual bonus scheme 26 days holiday, plus bank holidays & 2 paid personal days 6 months fully paid maternity/adoption leave and 16 weeks fully paid paternity leave (eligibility criteria applies) Pension plan, with a double matching employer contribution Private medical & dental insurance and healthcare cash plan Life insurance, personal accident insurance and income protection Mental health and neurodiversity support programs Company Employee Stock Purchase Plan (eligibility criteria applies) Fitness reimbursement plan, worth £600 per annum Flexible working hours Weekly happy hours, seasonal parties and monthly social events Annual rail season ticket advance and cycle to work scheme #LI-Hybrid #LI-NH3We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer, which means we are committed to creating and celebrating diverse thoughts, cultures, and backgrounds throughout our organization. Employment with us is based on substantive ability, objective qualifications, and work ethic – not an individual’s race, creed, color, religion, sex or gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin or ancestry, alienage or citizenship status, physical or mental disability, pregnancy, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, status as a victim of domestic violence or sex offenses, reproductive health decision, or any other characteristics protected by applicable law. As an equal opportunity employer, we are committed to providing the necessary support and accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities, health conditions, or impairments (subject to any local qualifying requirements) to ensure their full participation in the job application or interview process. Please contact us at accommodationrequest@zynga.com to request any accommodations or for support related to your application for an open position. Please be aware that Zynga does not conduct job interviews or make job offers over third-party messaging apps such as Telegram, WhatsApp, or others. Zynga also does not engage in any financial exchanges during the recruitment or onboarding process, and will never ask a candidate for their personal or financial information over an app or other unofficial chat channel. Any attempt to do so may be the result of a scamp or phishing attack, and you should not engage. Zynga’s in-house recruitment team will only contact individuals through their official Company email addresses (i.e., via a zynga.com, naturalmotion.com, smallgiantgames.com, themavens.com, gram.gs email domain).

apiJob.title: Senior/Lead UI/UX Designer - Gram Games
apiJob.description: Back to jobsSenior/Lead UI/UX Designer - Gram GamesLondon, UKApplyLevel Up Your Career with Zynga! At Zynga, we bring people together through the power of play. As a global leader in interactive entertainment and a proud label of Take-Two Interactive, our games have been downloaded over 6 billion times—connecting players in 175+ countries through fun, strategy, and a little friendly competition. From thrilling casino spins to epic strategy battles, mind-bending puzzles, and social word challenges, our diverse game portfolio has something for everyone. Fan-favorites and latest hits include FarmVille™, Words With Friends™, Zynga Poker™, Game of Thrones Slots Casino™, Wizard of Oz Slots™, Hit it Rich! Slots™, Wonka Slots™, Top Eleven™, Toon Blast™, Empires & Puzzles™, Merge Dragons!™, CSR Racing™, Harry Potter: Puzzles & Spells™, Match Factory™, and Color Block Jam™—plus many more! Founded in 2007 and headquartered in California, our teams span North America, Europe, and Asia, working together to craft unforgettable gaming experiences. Whether you're spinning, strategizing, matching, or competing, Zynga is where fun meets innovation—and where you can take your career to the next level. Join us and be part of the play!As a Senior/Lead UI/UX Designer at Gram Games, you will be a hands-on creative force driving the player experience for our newest mobile game projects. You will work at the heart of an experienced team, collaborating with artists, producers, and developers to define the visual language and usability of titles from their earliest stages. You are not just a strategist; you are a builder who can carry a design from a rough sketch to a polished, functional implementation in Unity. Responsibilities Produce creative, player-focused wireframes, user flows, and comprehensive supporting documentation that serve as the blueprint for new game mechanics. Create stunning User Interface art assets that are flexible, efficient, and adaptable to a variety of artistic styles suitable for the "New Games" pipeline. Design and directly implement user interface screens within Unity, ensuring that the final in-game experience matches the design vision. Work closely with game designers and lead artists to establish and maintain a consistent, world-class visual identity for new IPs. Partner with engineers and technical artists to solve complex implementation challenges and ensure designs are optimized for mobile performance. Guide the work of other UI/UX artists, providing actionable feedback and fostering a culture of creative excellence. Requirements Strong hands-on experience with UI implementation in the Unity Engine (UGUI or similar) is essential. Highly proficient in Photoshop and Figma for high-fidelity prototyping and asset creation. Proven experience in the mobile game industry, with a deep understanding of mobile-specific design patterns and constraints. Expert knowledge of UX principles with a focus on practical problem solving and rapid prototyping. A portfolio demonstrating strong artistic sense, typography, color theory, and layout skills. Extensive experience collaborating with engineers, artists, and product leads to balance creative vision with technical feasibility. Exceptional teamwork and communication skills, with the ability to articulate design decisions to stakeholders. Good to have Knowledge of Adobe Illustrator, as well as UI animation and visual effects (VFX) skills. Proactive ability to provide constructive feedback and receive it effectively to iterate on designs. Experience with different methods of play-testing and the ability to translate player data into meaningful UI/UX improvements. Experience working across multiple UI/UX styles simultaneously, from hyper-casual to mid-core aesthetics. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer, which means we are committed to creating and celebrating diverse thoughts, cultures, and backgrounds throughout our organization. Employment with us is based on substantive ability, objective qualifications, and work ethic – not an individual’s race, creed, color, religion, sex or gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin or ancestry, alienage or citizenship status, physical or mental disability, pregnancy, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, status as a victim of domestic violence or sex offenses, reproductive health decision, or any other characteristics protected by applicable law. As an equal opportunity employer, we are committed to providing the necessary support and accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities, health conditions, or impairments (subject to any local qualifying requirements) to ensure their full participation in the job application or interview process. Please contact us at accommodationrequest@zynga.com to request any accommodations or for support related to your application for an open position. Please be aware that Zynga does not conduct job interviews or make job offers over third-party messaging apps such as Telegram, WhatsApp, or others. Zynga also does not engage in any financial exchanges during the recruitment or onboarding process, and will never ask a candidate for their personal or financial information over an app or other unofficial chat channel. Any attempt to do so may be the result of a scamp or phishing attack, and you should not engage. Zynga’s in-house recruitment team will only contact individuals through their official Company email addresses (i.e., via a zynga.com, naturalmotion.com, smallgiantgames.com, themavens.com, gram.gs email domain).

apiJob.title: Game Design Director
apiJob.description: Back to jobsGame Design DirectorBarcelona, SpainApplyLevel Up Your Career with Zynga! At Zynga, we bring people together through the power of play. As a global leader in interactive entertainment and a proud label of Take-Two Interactive, our games have been downloaded over 6 billion times—connecting players in 175+ countries through fun, strategy, and a little friendly competition. From thrilling casino spins to epic strategy battles, mind-bending puzzles, and social word challenges, our diverse game portfolio has something for everyone. Fan-favorites and latest hits include FarmVille™, Words With Friends™, Zynga Poker™, Game of Thrones Slots Casino™, Wizard of Oz Slots™, Hit it Rich! Slots™, Wonka Slots™, Top Eleven™, Toon Blast™, Empires & Puzzles™, Merge Dragons!™, CSR Racing™, Harry Potter: Puzzles & Spells™, Match Factory™, and Color Block Jam™—plus many more! Founded in 2007 and headquartered in California, our teams span North America, Europe, and Asia, working together to craft unforgettable gaming experiences. Whether you're spinning, strategizing, matching, or competing, Zynga is where fun meets innovation—and where you can take your career to the next level. Join us and be part of the play! Who we are: Let's have fun shaping your future! We are Socialpoint, a world-renowned mobile game studio proudly part of the Zynga & Take-Two Interactive family. We’re the creators of hits like Dragon City, Two Dots, Top Troops, and Monster Legends, loved by hundreds of millions of players around the globe.We craft the best social games, bringing joy from Barcelona to the world. Now, we want to bring the world to Barcelona! At Socialpoint, work and play intertwine seamlessly, and we celebrate the diversity that makes us stronger. No matter who you are or where you’re from, you’re welcome here. Join us for a future where making games is as thrilling as playing them! Position Overview: As the Design Director for Monster Legends, you will report directly to the GM and join a team that is committed to delivering great player experiences that turn into a growing business. Your mission will be to lead the design department (Systems, Level, UI/UX) and cooperate with your close product/engineering / art/production peers to define long term game goals, draft a strategy and follow up the execution What You'll do: Strong team fit: results-oriented, pragmatic, analytical, humble, ambitious and people-centric Product Strategy: Cooperate to define the game’s vision, strategy and roadmap Game Execution: raise standards leading by example Management: Unify and lead the design department (UI/UX, Level Design, Game Design). Setup clear goals & KPIs, followup results and remove roadblocks. What you bring: +7 years of experience in Product / Design positions. Proven track record of managing a design or product team that delivered business results in a sustained way. Strong analytical mindset. apiJob.title: Brand Campaign Manager
apiJob.description: Back to jobsBrand Campaign ManagerLondon, UKApplyLevel Up Your Career with Zynga! At Zynga, we bring people together through the power of play. As a global leader in interactive entertainment and a proud label of Take-Two Interactive, our games have been downloaded over 6 billion times—connecting players in 175+ countries through fun, strategy, and a little friendly competition. From thrilling casino spins to epic strategy battles, mind-bending puzzles, and social word challenges, our diverse game portfolio has something for everyone. Fan-favorites and latest hits include FarmVille™, Words With Friends™, Zynga Poker™, Game of Thrones Slots Casino™, Wizard of Oz Slots™, Hit it Rich! Slots™, Wonka Slots™, Top Eleven™, Toon Blast™, Empires & Puzzles™, Merge Dragons!™, CSR Racing™, Harry Potter: Puzzles & Spells™, Match Factory™, and Color Block Jam™—plus many more! Founded in 2007 and headquartered in California, our teams span North America, Europe, and Asia, working together to craft unforgettable gaming experiences. Whether you're spinning, strategizing, matching, or competing, Zynga is where fun meets innovation—and where you can take your career to the next level. Join us and be part of the play!Position Overview: We are seeking a Manager, Brand Campaign to join our expanding Brand Central business unit. We are looking for a tenacious and proactive manager focused on delivering Brand campaigns across Paid Brand Media across an ever evolving gaming portfolio whilst supporting co-promotional partnerships - driving both brand equity and player growth through integrated, creative, and measurable campaigns. The ideal candidate is a proactive, hands-on marketer with strong media expertise, capable of driving brand equity and player growth through integrated, creative, and measurable campaigns in a fast-paced environment. We embrace a hybrid work environment. Within this role you will work 2 days per week in our London office and the remaining days at home. What You'll Do: Brand Media Strategy & Vision (Primary Focus) Partner with Brand Strategy Lead to define upper- and mid-funnel brand media strategy across portfolio titles. Collaborate with UA leadership to ensure brand media efforts complement and support lower-funnel performance initiatives. Support Consumer Insights initiatives, including testing frameworks, brief development, and content delivery. Identify opportunities to evolve brand storytelling and media approaches across platforms and markets. Brand Media Campaign Execution & Cross-Functional Collaboration Own end-to-end execution of paid Brand Media campaigns, including briefing, timelines, approvals, launch readiness, and post-campaign reporting. Lead day-to-day brand media planning with a hybrid model, working across media agencies and direct platform partners (Google, Meta, TikTok, etc.). Collaborate closely with Brand Studio, UA, Influencer, Creative, Product Marketing, and Live Ops teams to ensure cohesive execution. Serve as day-to-day point of contact with Business Operations for POs, NDAs, and key legal workflows (e.g., new agency onboarding). Ensure all media activity aligns with brand positioning, creative standards, and player experience expectations. Brand Promotional Activations Support (Secondary Focus) Support in executing large-scale brand co-promotions, including in-game, social, paid, and owned-channel activations. Assist with co-promotional partnerships, ensuring strong integration with broader brand media efforts. Contribute to ideation and execution of new activation or integration opportunities across the portfolio. Agency & Partner Management Act as lead point of contact for brand media agencies, briefing and refining proposals in alignment with leadership priorities. Build and maintain strong relationships with agencies and platform partners. Maintain and update Portfolio Games’ Brand Partnership Guidelines and ensure brand safety compliance across campaigns. Measurement, Reporting & Impact Define clear KPIs aligned to campaign objectives; monitor performance and optimize against results. Partner with Marketing Analytics to ensure tracking readiness (e.g., brand lift studies, in-game surveys, tracking tools). Deliver post-campaign reporting with actionable insights and recommendations to inform future brand investments. Knowledge Sharing & Team Contribution Support Leads with internal quarterly updates across the Brand Central division. Contribute to the development of a monthly industry news and trends newsletter. Proactively surface relevant industry changes, platform updates, and emerging marketing trends. What You Bring: 5+ years of experience in general Brand Management or Integrated Marketing Proven experience leading high-impact brand media campaigns, ideally within gaming, entertainment, or consumer tech Strong understanding of upper- and mid-funnel marketing and how it supports performance outcomes Experience collaborating with agencies, platform partners, and cross-functional teams Familiarity with co-marketing partnerships and influencer marketing, or a strong willingness to expand in these areas Understanding of mobile gaming audiences and free-to-play business models Entrepreneurial mindset with comfort operating in ambiguity Excellent communication, presentation (slide decks), and project management skills Bonus Points: Experience in mobile gaming, apps, or entertainment Experience supporting influencer-led or creator-based partnerships Exposure to global campaigns across multiple regions What We Offer You: Competitive salary and discretionary annual bonus scheme 26 days holiday, plus bank holidays & 2 paid personal days 6 months fully paid maternity/adoption leave and 16 weeks fully paid paternity leave (eligibility criteria applies) Pension plan, with a double matching employer contribution Private medical & dental insurance and healthcare cash plan Life insurance, personal accident insurance and income protection Mental health and neurodiversity support programs Company Employee Stock Purchase Plan (eligibility criteria applies) Fitness reimbursement plan, worth £600 per annum Flexible working hours Weekly happy hours, seasonal parties and monthly social events Annual rail season ticket advance and cycle to work scheme #LI-Hybrid #LI-NH3We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer, which means we are committed to creating and celebrating diverse thoughts, cultures, and backgrounds throughout our organization. Employment with us is based on substantive ability, objective qualifications, and work ethic – not an individual’s race, creed, color, religion, sex or gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin or ancestry, alienage or citizenship status, physical or mental disability, pregnancy, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, status as a victim of domestic violence or sex offenses, reproductive health decision, or any other characteristics protected by applicable law. As an equal opportunity employer, we are committed to providing the necessary support and accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities, health conditions, or impairments (subject to any local qualifying requirements) to ensure their full participation in the job application or interview process. Please contact us at accommodationrequest@zynga.com to request any accommodations or for support related to your application for an open position. Please be aware that Zynga does not conduct job interviews or make job offers over third-party messaging apps such as Telegram, WhatsApp, or others. Zynga also does not engage in any financial exchanges during the recruitment or onboarding process, and will never ask a candidate for their personal or financial information over an app or other unofficial chat channel. Any attempt to do so may be the result of a scamp or phishing attack, and you should not engage. apiJob.title: Art Producer, mo.coHelsinki - onsiteArt, Animation & DesignonsiteFullTime
apiJob.description: all positionsHelsinki – onsite – FullTimeArt Producer, mo.coWe’re looking for an Art Producer to join the mo.co team in Helsinki to help us deliver amazing game content for our players.As an Art Producer, you’ll be at the heart of our content production, working closely with artists and other disciplines to deliver high-quality game content across every update. You’ll manage the entire content pipeline - from concept through implementation - ensuring that everything comes together at the right time and characters, environments, VFX, animations, and all other art assets are delivered smoothly, efficiently, and to an exceptional standard.You’ll be joining a team that communicates openly, makes decisions together, and looks out for one another when things get busy. We don’t overcomplicate the process, and we don’t let egos get in the way. It’s a steady, supportive environment where everyone’s here to make the most incredible art and content for our players.What You'll Be DoingOversee and manage the full content production pipeline, including scheduling, task prioritization, milestone setting, and progress trackingMaintain clear, consistent communication within the content team and across all relevant internal and external stakeholdersHandle all aspects of outsource management from contracts, budgets and invoices to partner communication and the overall relationshipCollaborate with other disciplines to define realistic deadlines, align on content needs, and allocate art resources effectivelyTroubleshoot and resolve art or content-related issues in partnership with the development teamIdentify and implement strategies that improve efficiency, clarity, and workflow within the content production processWhat You HaveProfessional experience in art/content production, ideally within the mobile games industryStrong understanding of game art creation and content design principlesExcellent organizational and project management skillsStrong communication abilities and leadership mindsetPassion for mobile games and a drive to deliver high-quality, player-facing contentWould Be Nice if You Also HaveExperience coordinating multiple art disciplines such as character art, environment art, VFX and animationFamiliarity with live-service pipelines and update cadencesKnowledge of tools commonly used in game art/content workflows (e.g., Maya, Blender, Photoshop)Experience collaborating with external partners or outsourcing vendorsAppreciation for player experience and how art/content contributes to gameplay clarity and qualityWhere You'll BeThis role is based in our Helsinki office. The mo.co team works primarily onsite, with flexibility for hybrid work.–––That's it about the role! Below, we've gathered some things we feel are important for you to know. Totally optional, but a highly recommended read. Once you're ready to apply, just send us your application through the form on the bottom of the page. –––About Supercell Supercell is a games company from Helsinki, Finland, with offices also in San Francisco, Seoul, Shanghai, and London. You might know us as the makers of Hay Day, Clash of Clans, Boom Beach, Clash Royale, and Brawl Stars. Our mission is to create great games that as many people as possible play for years and that are remembered forever.So, how do we make great games? By putting together the best teams and giving them the freedom and independence to succeed. And by taking risks, failing, sharing learnings, and killing lots of projects. Hey, You Might Love It Here!Independent cells and trust are at the core of our culture. But it takes more than that to make great games. We take good care of our people, providing them with the compensation, work environment, and resources they need to succeed while having fun along the way.You Are Not Your Job Title ™Here, you won’t need to focus on chasing titles or climbing ladders. Internally, our job titles don’t include prefixes like Senior, Junior, Principal, or Director. Recognition isn’t tied to your title, as it doesn't define the impact you can have around here.Benefits and Compensation Luring you in with glitter, glamour, and gems isn't what we're about. We want you to enjoy your time here fully, so we structure our compensation and benefits with that in mind. It starts with perceiving you as a human being, not a resource.Relocation? Yes!No matter where you’re moving from, our dedicated mobility team and partners will support you throughout your move. We’ll ensure the process is as smooth as possible for you and anyone joining you – whether they’re family members of the human or animal kind!Not Sure if You Should Apply? Many candidates with great skills and experience second-guess themselves. The bar is high, but if this role excites you, apply! We’re here to help you succeed. Also, we're happy to learn about any specific accommodations you may need to fully engage in our recruitment process.Wishing you all the best,The Supercell Recruitment teamP.S.Here's a video about what Supercell is about. Best enjoyed with salmiakki and rye bread!Interested?Then just apply hereWe're looking forward to hearing from you. apiJob.title: Game Designer, Clash Royale
apiJob.description: all positionsShanghai – onsite – FullTimeGame Designer, Clash RoyaleWe are seeking a passionate and experienced Game Designer to join our Shanghai Studio, with a focus on enhancing the gameplay of Clash Royale. You will be expected to independently plan your work, develop design solutions, and implement them using our tools. The ideal candidate will also collaborate with a team of talented developers to solve large-scale challenges.At Supercell, we believe that small, well-coordinated teams have the potential to create truly memorable games. It's essential that every team member takes pride in their work and understands the responsibility of delivering quality and fun to our players.As a Game Designer at Supercell, you will work closely with other designers, programmers, and artists to create engaging gameplay content, game modes, and systems that make Clash Royale the best strategy game in the mobile market. You will also be a key contributor in shaping the future of Clash Royale’s gameplay, as well as the overall product direction.If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you!What You'll Be DoingCreate and improve gameplay systems/content for Clash Royale.Polish and upgrade core combat design of Clash Royale.Collaborate with other disciplines and teams to produce a cohesive game experience.Support the development of the game with any additional skills.What You HaveExtensive understanding, skills, and experience with gameplay design.Strong player empathy.Understanding other design areas outside of gameplay design is a big plus.Experience using game engine is a big plus.Excellent communication, interpersonal and organizational skills.Absolute passion for playing and making games.Fluent in English – reading, writing and speaking.Being a great teammate – we believe making games is a team sport.Where You'll BeThis role is based in our Shanghai office. If you are not local, our relocation team would be excited to help you with your move to Shanghai,China. We provide comprehensive support not only for you, but also for your family!–––That's it about the role! Below, we've gathered some things we feel are important for you to know. Totally optional, but a highly recommended read. Once you're ready to apply, just send us your application through the form on the bottom of the page. –––About SupercellSupercell is a games company from Helsinki, Finland, with offices also in San Francisco, Seoul, Shanghai, and London. You might know us as the makers of Hay Day, Clash of Clans, Boom Beach, Clash Royale, Brawl Stars, and Squad Busters. Our mission is to create great games that as many people as possible play for years and that are remembered forever.So, how do we make great games? By putting together the best teams and giving them the freedom and independence to succeed. And by taking risks, failing, sharing learnings, and killing lots of projects.The Shanghai studioAs Supercell’s first international game development studio, the Shanghai studio is one of the most exciting things happening in Supercell and a unique opportunity to join at a relatively early stage to help shape our path. Our vision is to be a world-class international studio, making new global hit games while leveraging the unique advantages of the game development scene in China and broader Asia.Hey, you Might Love It Here!Independent cells and trust are at the core of our culture. apiJob.title: Senior Game Designer, Project R.I.S.E
apiJob.description: all positionsShanghai – onsite – FullTimeSenior Game Designer, Project R.I.S.EWe are looking for a passionate and experienced game designer who specializes in Unreal Engine to join our Shanghai Studio.You will be working on one of our new projects. You should be able to independently design new features and systems, and support their implementation, but the ideal candidate will have demonstrable experience in crafting second-to-second action gameplay, including, but not limited to level mechanics, layout design and enemy/AI behavior.If you think that describes you, then we’d love to hear from you.What You'll Be DoingPrototype gameplay content (mechanics, enemies, level interactivity) by yourself with minimal dependencies on other disciplines.On-hands design and iteration of new features, game mechanics and gameplay contentCollaborate with other disciplines to follow your designs from initial documentation through to final in-engine polish.Support the development of the game with any additional skills.What You HaveAt least 7 years of professional experience as a Gameplay Designer with a portfolio demonstrating combat gameplay and/or level content created by yourself using Unreal Engine & Blueprint.Proven ability to implement enemies, NPCs and combat mechanics into interesting encountersProactive doer who takes responsibility and pride in their own work when given the freedom to work independentlyStrong cross-discipline communication skillsBeing a great teammate - we believe making games is a team sportWould Be Nice if You Also HaveFamiliarity with level design tools and concepts. Proven track record of building level blockout.Experience with combat AI and familiarity with Unreal Behavior Trees.Extensive knowledge of Unreal's GAS - from Gameplay Effects to Ability ModifiersWhere You'll BeThis role is based in our Shanghai office. If you are not local, our relocation team would be excited to help you with your move to Shanghai,China. We provide comprehensive support not only for you, but also for your family!–––That's it about the role! Below, we've gathered some things we feel are important for you to know. Totally optional, but a highly recommended read. Once you're ready to apply, just send us your application through the form on the bottom of the page. –––About SupercellSupercell is a games company from Helsinki, Finland, with offices also in San Francisco, Seoul, Shanghai, and London. You might know us as the makers of Hay Day, Clash of Clans, Boom Beach, Clash Royale, Brawl Stars, and Squad Busters. Our mission is to create great games that as many people as possible play for years and that are remembered forever.So, how do we make great games? By putting together the best teams and giving them the freedom and independence to succeed. And by taking risks, failing, sharing learnings, and killing lots of projects.The Shanghai studioAs Supercell’s first international game development studio, the Shanghai studio is one of the most exciting things happening in Supercell and a unique opportunity to join at a relatively early stage to help shape our path. Our vision is to be a world-class international studio, making new global hit games while leveraging the unique advantages of the game development scene in China and broader Asia.Hey, you Might Love It Here!Independent cells and trust are at the core of our culture. But it takes more than that to make great games. We take good care of our people, providing them with the compensation, work environment, and resources they need to succeed while having fun along the way.You Are Not Your Job Title ™Here, you won’t need to focus on chasing titles or climbing ladders. Internally, our job titles don’t include prefixes like Senior, Junior, Principal, or Director. Recognition isn’t tied to your title, as it doesn't define the impact you can have around here.Benefits and CompensationLuring you in with glitter, glamour, and gems isn't what we're about. We want you to enjoy your time here fully, so we structure our compensation and benefits with that in mind. It starts with perceiving you as a human being, not a resource.Relocation? Yes!No matter where you’re moving from, our dedicated mobility team and partners will support you throughout your move. We’ll ensure the process is as smooth as possible for you and anyone joining you – whether they’re family members of the human or animal kind!Not sure if you should apply?Many candidates with great skills and experience second-guess themselves. The bar is high, but if this role excites you, apply! We’re here to help you succeed. Also, we're happy to learn about any specific accommodations you may need to fully engage in our recruitment process.Wishing you all the best,The Supercell Recruitment teamP.S. Here's a video about what we do. (Best enjoyed with salmiakki and rye bread)Interested?Then just apply hereWe're looking forward to hearing from you. It's always exciting to receive thoughtful applications with more than just a blurry image of a cat. Although we do love cats.Name *Email *PhoneResume *We accept PDF, JPG and PNG files.Add fileLink to portfolio or other siteAnother linkApplication LetterAdd fileExtra Attachment Add fileYour willingness to relocate, if you are not already based in the location of the jobChoose an optionSelect an optionWhere did you hear about this position? *Choose an option.
