Use code at checkout: Use code at checkout:Offer termsCloseEnter code at checkout by 11:59 PM EST on the expiration date. Discount applies to the first payment of an applicable new Squarespace subscription only. Does not apply to recurring payments. Cannot be used on previous purchases, upgrades, in combination with other offers, or payments through In-App Pay. JoinOur Team About us Careers Our team Locations Inclusion & Impact About us Careers Our team Locations Inclusion & Impact Our flexible work philosophy Flexibility at Squarespace isn’t new and all roles at Squarespace are flexible in one way or another. Before the pandemic, Squarespace embraced flexible work - 13% of our employees were fully remote, while most in-office employees had flexible schedules. As we look to the future of work, we are increasing our existing flexibility. We believe that flexibility increases productivity and satisfaction, decreases our carbon footprint related to commuting, and enables us to attract and retain a more diverse and inclusive workforce. Squarespace’s Flexible Work Policy outlines two distinct work classifications - Officespace and Homespace - designed to help foster an inclusive and collaborative environment. In the same way that there isn’t a one size fits all solution for our customers, there isn’t a one size fits all approach that will work for every individual and every role. So we have empowered individuals, their managers, and department leaders to determine the appropriate approach to flexible work for them. The type of flexibility needed will vary based on the role - with consideration for whether the role needs to have face to face collaboration and interaction, and the ability for that role to be done remotely vs. in the office. 1.Officespace - employees who spend at least some of their week working from a Squarespace office location. Each Officespace employee’s work schedule is agreed upon between them and their manager and approved by their department head, with some being fully in-office and some having flexible schedules. Depending on their role and how often they are in the office, some Officespace employees will have assigned desks while others will participate in hoteling of desk space. 2.Homespace - employees who spend all or the majority of their time working remotely and do not have a desk in a Squarespace office. Fully remote positions are currently available for designated roles at department discretion. We also embrace the benefits of face to face interaction and collaboration, so curating an enticing office experience remains part of our Squarespace approach. Our office is so much more than a place people go to work. Each of our offices has been built to inspire creativity and foster community. It’s more than a workplace. We invite all who enter to find a space that feels their own. It’s a collective. It’s our space. Whether you have a Officespace or Homespace workstyle, we aspire to foster collaboration and connection between everyone at Squarespace. Open positions We’re looking for people to join the team who are as excited as we are to help build the platform that empowers the future generation of creators to be successful online. apiJob.description: CareersKeep work humanBe the person behind the AI experience Explore careersMake customer experiences betterBe a part of supporting more than 100,000 customers globally by growing AI technology that turns approximately two billion of their service interactions each year into pure joy. By building your career with Zendesk, you’ll touch every person on the planet with faster, easier, happier customer experiences. And when you couple your ambition with our people-first culture, you’ll help connect global brands like Lush, Grubhub and others with their customers in an exceptionally personalised way.CULTUREWe’re good companyCreate solutions with supportive team members who are energised by change, challenge and making a real difference for people. We bring calm and confidence to the always-flexing and sometimes chaotic world of customer service tech.Explore careers“Investing my time in social impact work is an amazing way for me to give back and meet like-minded people. Getting involved brings so much positivity to my days as well as fuelling good relationships at work by building trust and engagement at all levels.”SahityaSenior Executive Assistant, Product Development Programme Management, Australia “We really understand the importance of teamwork. You can’t build something at the scale that we do at Zendesk on your own.”ŁukaszSenior Engineering Manager, Kraków “I wanted to be in an environment where you can shine whilst also learning a lot from others. I found it at Zendesk.”JosephineBusiness Development Representative, Mexico “I’ve never seen such a supportive organisation that is, from the top down, willing to strategise, hop on a call and roll up their sleeves. When we work together, nothing stops us.”RodneySenior Director, Customer Success, USA “Investing my time in social impact work is an amazing way for me to give back and meet like-minded people. Getting involved brings so much positivity to my days as well as fuelling good relationships at work by building trust and engagement at all levels.”SahityaSenior Executive Assistant, Product Development Programme Management, Australia “We really understand the importance of teamwork. You can’t build something at the scale that we do at Zendesk on your own.”ŁukaszSenior Engineering Manager, Kraków “I wanted to be in an environment where you can shine whilst also learning a lot from others. I found it at Zendesk.”JosephineBusiness Development Representative, Mexico “I’ve never seen such a supportive organisation that is, from the top down, willing to strategise, hop on a call and roll up their sleeves. When we work together, nothing stops us.”RodneySenior Director, Customer Success, USA “Investing my time in social impact work is an amazing way for me to give back and meet like-minded people. Getting involved brings so much positivity to my days as well as fuelling good relationships at work by building trust and engagement at all levels.”SahityaSenior Executive Assistant, Product Development Programme Management, Australia More meaningful moments. Fewer Zoom calls.What’s it like to work here? Our offices reflect the global cities we call home, and have spaces for collaboration, contemplation and events. We have stocked kitchens, quiet areas and game spaces for when you need to recharge or unwind. And with our hybrid approach, you’ll experience flexibility and connection, collaboration and learning with your team.Explore careersQUIZHow Zendesk are you?Zendesk employees are special people. Answer these questions and tally your score – if you answer yes to 3 or more, you’re one of us!Do you love pushing yourself to achieve great things?Are you curious, with a knack for visionary thinking?Do you thrive in a dynamic environment?Are you a natural leader who embraces accountability?Do you think with a global mindset and value diverse perspectives?TOTAL REWARDSBenefits that care for your whole selfWe take your wellbeing personally – no matter your role, the continent you work from or where you are in your career journey. At Zendesk, expect competitive salaries, plus extensive benefits with holistic support for physical and mental health, with time away to recharge.Physical wellbeingMedical insurance, health support and leave programmes; movement with fitness partners, apps and classesEmotional and spiritual wellbeingAccess to therapists, coaches, mindfulness and mental fitness apps, employee assistance programmeFinancial wellbeingCompetitive compensation, retirement, and financial security programmes (including disability, accident and life insurance)Intellectual and occupational wellbeingDevelopment through concentrated programmes, on-demand learning and support, coaching and mentoringSocial and environmental wellbeingEmployee Resource Groups, family-forming funds, benefits and support, global parental leave programme, military leave, and emergency leave for natural disasters and unforeseen eventsLEARNING & DEVELOPMENTWe invest in growth – starting with yoursYou’re going to love your opportunities for career transformation here. High-potential development programmes help you differentiate your contributions, build specific leadership skills and accelerate your career.Explore careersCAREER GOALSFind where you fitGeneral & AdministrativeWith many moving parts within a global organisation, our Finance, Legal, People and Security teams are strategically positioned to keep Zendesk people, services, finances and security expertly sorted.Explore careersGo to marketMake a global difference in customer experience advocacy, marketing and sales, or creative and brand experience. Together, we accelerate growth towards our already multi-billion-dollar company.Explore careersResearch & DevelopmentAs a Product Developer, CIO or Engineering global team member, join us to grow your career on the forefront of AI thought leadership and product insights.Explore careersEarly careersAre you a go-getter with people skills, determination to succeed and an enthusiasm for learning? Perfect – join us to make every customer interaction frictionless.Explore careersAll jobsExplore opportunities to growExplore careersINCLUSIONYou belongWe intentionally build an inclusive workforce that upholds our culture of empathy and camaraderie. Employee Communities (ECs) help build our inclusive culture by amplifying the voices of underrepresented groups within and beyond Zendesk. Learn moreSOCIAL & ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACTWe’re a force for global goodOur dedication to exceptional service is integrated into every aspect of our business, from the products we build to the communities we impact and the customer experiences we enrich. Through grants, employee engagement programmes, products and robust climate action, we’ve made a tangible difference in our global community. Our highlights include: Robust employee volunteer programme, including pro bono opportunities that support global non-profits Millions of dollars donated and a 100% free product donation programme for eligible non-profits Sponsored upskilling and certification programme for under-resourced communities Impactful climate action programme that has achieved 100% carbon neutral products Visit Zendesk FoundationLOCATIONSThere’s a world of opportunities hereWhere do you want to work?With our global presence, hybrid work approach and commitment to flexibility, we keep careers people-first. Just like the customer experiences we provide. Find your location. Find your role.Explore careers Previous

apiJob.title: Skip to main content
apiJob.description: Find Your Spark HCLTech is a globally recognized leader in the tech and IT industry, but we’ve never forgotten the startup mindset that got us here. We’ve always approached our work with an idea-first attitude because every one of our accomplishments —no matter how big or small —can be traced back to an idea’s single spark. It’s that spark —that inner drive —that sets our people apart from our competitors. It enables us not just to pull off game-changing feat after game-changing feat but to better our world in the process. We want you to find your spark. Because that’s what drives you to be better, be more and, ultimately, be more fulfilled. Our People-Centric Culture We are admired as a top employer around the world and offer a global scale you can rely on. We recognize talent and empower people with new capabilities. We cheer you on with advice as you explore your path in a supportive and inclusive culture. We enable our leaders to scale in new domains and territories. We focus on next-gen capabilities and talents and provide learning opportunities at all levels. We give our people the freedom and flexibility to find their spark and grow in their own unique ways. Hiring Process Putting people first begins the moment we meet. Tell us about your skills and aspirations. Explore job opportunities that speak to your journey. Meet Our People At HCLTech, we embrace great thinking wherever it comes from, regardless of title or position. The spark a colleague brings to the table energizes the company and drives individual growth and mobility. Every day, more than 226,500 people are creating moments of pride for their industries, clients, teams and themselves. Here’s what some of them have to say about how HCLTech is helping them find their spark. Can’t Find the Job of Your Choice? Never miss out on new jobs at HCLTech.

apiJob.title: Frontend AI UI EngineerFull-time
apiJob.description: Frontend AI UI EngineerFull-timeCompany DescriptionOrganizations everywhere struggle under the crushing costs and complexities of “solutions” that promise to simplify their lives. To create a better experience for their customers and employees. To help them grow. Software is a choice that can make or break a business. Create better or worse experiences. Propel or throttle growth. Business software has become a blocker instead of ways to get work done.There’s another option. Freshworks. With a fresh vision for how the world works.At Freshworks, we build uncomplicated service software that delivers exceptional customer and employee experiences. Our enterprise-grade solutions are powerful, yet easy to use, and quick to deliver results. Our people-first approach to AI eliminates friction, making employees more effective and organizations more productive. Over 72,000 companies, including Bridgestone, New Balance, Nucor, S&P Global, and Sony Music, trust Freshworks’ customer experience (CX) and employee experience (EX) software to fuel customer loyalty and service efficiency. And, over 4,500 Freshworks employees make this possible, all around the world.Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.Job DescriptionWe are looking for a Frontend AI UI Engineer to design and implement highly interactive, intuitive, and enterprise-grade UIs for our Agentic AI Platform. You will collaborate closely with the Principal AI UI Architect to deliver visual interfaces that allow users to build, test, debug, and deploy outcome-driven reasoning agents. This role involves developing agent builders, simulation tools, dialog orchestration interfaces, and multi-channel assistant deployment UIs, ensuring a seamless developer and enterprise experience. Key ResponsibilitiesAgentic UI DevelopmentBuild interactive visual editors (drag-and-drop) for agent orchestration and reasoning workflows (LangGraph visualization). Implement prompt management, versioning, and testing interfaces for agent development.Develop real-time debugging tools to visualize agent reasoning traces, tool invocations, and dialog flows. Integrate UI components with LangSmith APIs for agent observability, evaluations, and regression testing. User Simulation & Testing InterfacesImplement user simulation frameworks for testing agent strategies with varied personas and scenarios Build A/B testing dashboards for evaluating outcome-driven strategies across agents and prompts. Create UIs for multi-turn conversation playback, agent state inspection, and scenario-driven outcome analysis. Dialog Orchestration & Multi-Channel Experience Develop dialog flow editors to design multi-turn conversations with branching, context retention, and hierarchical dialogs. Build deployment interfaces to configure assistants across digital channels (chat, web, messaging) and voice/IVR systemsCore UI Framework & ArchitectureCollaborate with the architect to define frontend design patterns, state management, and modular UI frameworks. Integrate frontend with backend APIs, agent runtimes, and real-time event streams.Ensure UI scalability, performance optimization, and secure multi-tenant design for enterprise usage. Collaboration & Developer ExperiencePartner with backend engineers to integrate APIs and orchestration services into the UI seamlessly. Work closely with UX designers to deliver high-quality, intuitive user interfaces aligned with AI/agent workflows.Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and cross-functional planning with architects and engineers. Please note: This is a hybrid role that will be based in San Mateo, CA or Bellevue, WA and requires an in-office presence three days per week (Tuesday - Thursday). QualificationsRequired Qualifications7+ years of frontend engineering experience, building complex enterprise-grade UIsStrong expertise in React (e.g., next.js), TypeScript, and state management Experience developing visual workflow builders or graph-based editors (e.g., d3.js, React Flow)Knowledge of real-time UI deployment for live agent monitoring/debuggingFamiliarity with agentic AI concepts and their UI/UX requirementsProficiency in frontend testing, performance profiling, and accessibility best practicesUnderstanding of secure UI patterns (SSO/OAuth2, RBAC, multi-tenant UI isolation)Preferred QualificationsExperience building low-code/no-code interfaces for AI or developer platformsFamiliarity with LangSmith and agent observability tooling integration in UI workflowsExposure to conversational UI/UX design for chat and voice assistantsPrior experience with real-time collaborative editing (CRDTs, Yjs, or similar frameworks)Startup or early-stage product development experience in AI-driven SaaS environmentsAdditional InformationThe annual base salary range for this position is $238,000 - $342,000. Compensation is based on a variety of factors including but not limited to location, experience, job-related skills, and level. Bonus/equity may be available. Freshworks offers multiple options for dental, medical, vision, disability and life insurances. Equity + ESPP, flexible PTO, flexible spending, commuter benefits and wellness benefits are also offered. Freshworks also offers adoption and parental leave benefits.At Freshworks, we are creating a global workplace that enables everyone to find their true potential, purpose, and passion irrespective of their background, gender, race, sexual orientation, religion and ethnicity. We are committed to providing equal opportunity for all and believe that diversity in the workplace creates a more vibrant, richer work environment that advances the goals of our employees, communities and the business.I'm interestedI'm interestedPrivacy Notice

apiJob.title: Freshworks Senior Staff Product Designer (AI Experience) | SmartRecruiters
apiJob.description: Senior Staff Product Designer (AI Experience)Full-time Compensation: INR 0 - INR 0 - yearlyCompany DescriptionOrganizations everywhere struggle under the crushing costs and complexities of “solutions” that promise to simplify their lives. To create a better experience for their customers and employees. To help them grow. Software is a choice that can make or break a business. Create better or worse experiences. Propel or throttle growth. Business software has become a blocker instead of ways to get work done.There’s another option. Freshworks. With a fresh vision for how the world works.At Freshworks, we build uncomplicated service software that delivers exceptional customer and employee experiences. Our enterprise-grade solutions are powerful, yet easy to use, and quick to deliver results. Our people-first approach to AI eliminates friction, making employees more effective and organizations more productive. Over 72,000 companies, including Bridgestone, New Balance, Nucor, S&P Global, and Sony Music, trust Freshworks’ customer experience (CX) and employee experience (EX) software to fuel customer loyalty and service efficiency. And, over 4,500 Freshworks employees make this possible, all around the world.Fresh vision. Real impact. Come build it with us.Job DescriptionThe Senior Staff Product Designer for AI Experiences will, as a hands-on individual contributor, lead design for intelligent, human-centered experiences powered by the Freshworks AI platform. This critical role will shape how users interact with AI across our entire product portfolio—including customer service, IT, sales, and marketing—ensuring that machine learning, automation, and generative AI are seamlessly integrated into everyday workflows.This role will contribute to and help define the UX strategy for both AI infrastructure (platform capabilities, APIs, tools) and product-specific AI use cases (chatbots, smart recommendations, generative assistance, predictive automation). It will work directly with stakeholders in Product, Engineering, and other cross-functional areas to ship world class solutions across the Freshdesk and Freshservice product suites. The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in designing for complex, data-driven systems and a passion for making AI intuitive, trustworthy, and accessible to users of all skill levels.The Impact You Will MakeAs the Senior Staff Product Designer for AI Experiences, you will be the primary design architect for how the world interacts with Freshworks AI. You will move beyond standard interface design to invent new paradigms of Human-AI interaction. Your direct impact will be measured across four key pillars:Driving Widespread AI Adoption & Trust: You will transform complex, non-deterministic machine learning models into intuitive, frictionless workflows. By championing user control and explainability, you will bridge the gap between advanced AI capabilities and everyday user confidence, directly driving the adoption of AI features across our global customer base.Accelerating Speed-to-Market for AI Innovation: By creating scalable AI design patterns, frameworks, and platform-level UX guidelines, you will act as a force multiplier. Your foundational work will empower diverse product teams across Freshdesk, Freshservice, and beyond to ship consistent, world-class AI experiences faster and with higher quality.Pioneering Responsible & Ethical AI: You will safeguard our users and our brand by defining and embedding ethical AI frameworks into our product DNA. apiJob.description: Lead eLearning Designer - Technical EnablementFull-timeCompany DescriptionOrganizations everywhere struggle under the crushing costs and complexities of "solutions" that promise to simplify their lives. Our enterprise-grade solutions are powerful, yet easy to use, and quick to deliver results. Our people-first approach to AI eliminates friction, making employees more effective and organizations more productive. Over 72,000 companies, including Bridgestone, New Balance, Nucor, S&P Global, and Sony Music, trust Freshworks' customer experience (CX) and employee experience (EX) software to fuel customer loyalty and service efficiency. And, over 4,500 Freshworks employees make this possible, all around the world. Fresh Vision. Real Impact. Come build it with us. Job DescriptionFreshworks is looking for a highly creative and tech-savvy Learning Experience Designer to join our expanding Revenue Enablement team. In this role, you'll lead the design and development of impactful, measurable eLearning programs and resources that empower Freshworks teams to sell our products effectively. You'll partner closely with our Sales, Solution Engineering, and Professional Services teams to create educational content and training materials that enhance sales performance. With a deep understanding of adult learning principles, you'll translate complex business requirements into engaging and effective digital learning solutions in collaboration with subject matter experts and key stakeholders. This is a unique opportunity to shape the eLearning experiences that fuel our technical sales teams. Key ResponsibilitiesTechnical Sales Enablement: Design and build technical eLearning certifications to ensure our Solution Engineers, Professional Services, and Channel Sales teams are prepared to sell, demo, and implement our products.Digital Technical Training: Develop interactive eLearning modules, simulations, and knowledge checks focused on complex integrations, platform configuration, and custom solution delivery. Create competitive deep-dive content and objection handling scenarios for technical buyers, equipping SEs to articulate Freshworks' technical superiority.Pre-Sales Technical Content Creation: Lead the creation and maintenance of a robust library of technical validation documents, reference architectures, deployment guides, and demo scripts for partner SE use. Establish a feedback loop with Freshworks' internal Solution Engineering team to co-develop and validate partner technical enablement materials to ensure accuracy and consistency.Collaborative Curriculum Design: Partner with cross-functional teams and Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) to align our eLearning curriculum with their needs, utilizing AGILE methodologies for continuous improvement and flexibility.Global Scalable eLearning: Design and deliver cutting-edge digital training solutions that are scalable across global audiences. Create engaging eLearning courses, exercises, tutorials, job aids, knowledge assessments, and integrate social or connected learning strategies using multi-media-based assets.eLearning Design & Development: Utilize advanced eLearning authoring tools to develop interactive and immersive online learning experiences. Focus on content structure, clarity, and effective writing to collaborate seamlessly with eLearning developers.Information Architecture: Craft clear and logical information structures to ensure content flows intuitively and is easily understood. Apply learning science principles to enhance knowledge retention and learner engagement.Measurement & Continuous Improvement: Design robust assessments to measure learner performance and business impact. Regularly evaluate training solutions for quality and scalability, implementing iterative improvements based on data and feedback to drive measurable outcomes. Please note this is a hybrid role with onsite expectations of 3x/week (Tuesday - Thursday) from our Downtown Boston, MA office. Qualifications6–10 years of experience designing eLearning and digital training experiences (including interactive eLearning modules and job aids) to support technical sales audiences.Direct experience in a Sales Engineer, Solution Engineer, Professional Services, or comparable technical role.Strong understanding of the end-to-end Solution Engineering/Pre-Sales cycle, including discovery, technical qualification, complex demonstration, and proof-of-concept (POC) execution.Technical aptitude and ability to understand and articulate complex SaaS platform architectures, integration strategies, and competitive technical differentiators.Professional knowledge of eLearning authoring tools, such as Articulate 360 (Rise & Storyline), Camtasia, Vyond, Canva, and the Adobe Creative Suite.Experience facilitating design workshops with key stakeholders to establish the scope and success criteria for training.Strong organizational and project management skills.Exceptional writing and editing skills.Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.A proactive and adaptable mindset with a commitment to continuous improvement and learning.Additional InformationPlease note: This is a hybrid role that will be based in Boston, MA, and requires an in-office presence three days per week (Tuesday - Thursday). The annual base salary range for this position is $110,000 - $140,000 USD. This role is also eligible for a target bonus.Compensation is based on a variety of factors including but not limited to location, experience, job-related skills, and level. You will collaborate closely with the Principal AI UI Architect to deliver visual interfaces that allow users to build, test, debug, and deploy outcome-driven reasoning agents. This role involves developing agent builders, simulation tools, dialog orchestration interfaces, and multi-channel assistant deployment UIs, ensuring a seamless developer and enterprise experience. Key ResponsibilitiesAgentic UI DevelopmentBuild interactive visual editors (drag-and-drop) for agent orchestration and reasoning workflows (LangGraph visualization). Implement prompt management, versioning, and testing interfaces for agent development.Develop real-time debugging tools to visualize agent reasoning traces, tool invocations, and dialog flows. Integrate UI components with LangSmith APIs for agent observability, evaluations, and regression testing. User Simulation & Testing InterfacesImplement user simulation frameworks for testing agent strategies with varied personas and scenarios Build A/B testing dashboards for evaluating outcome-driven strategies across agents and prompts. Create UIs for multi-turn conversation playback, agent state inspection, and scenario-driven outcome analysis. Dialog Orchestration & Multi-Channel Experience Develop dialog flow editors to design multi-turn conversations with branching, context retention, and hierarchical dialogs. Build deployment interfaces to configure assistants across digital channels (chat, web, messaging) and voice/IVR systemsCore UI Framework & ArchitectureCollaborate with the architect to define frontend design patterns, state management, and modular UI frameworks. Integrate frontend with backend APIs, agent runtimes, and real-time event streams.Ensure UI scalability, performance optimization, and secure multi-tenant design for enterprise usage. Collaboration & Developer ExperiencePartner with backend engineers to integrate APIs and orchestration services into the UI seamlessly. Work closely with UX designers to deliver high-quality, intuitive user interfaces aligned with AI/agent workflows.Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and cross-functional planning with architects and engineers. Please note: This is a hybrid role that will be based in San Mateo, CA or Bellevue, WA and requires an in-office presence three days per week (Tuesday - Thursday). QualificationsRequired Qualifications7+ years of frontend engineering experience, building complex enterprise-grade UIsStrong expertise in React (e.g., next.js), TypeScript, and state management Experience developing visual workflow builders or graph-based editors (e.g., d3.js, React Flow)Knowledge of real-time UI deployment for live agent monitoring/debuggingFamiliarity with agentic AI concepts and their UI/UX requirementsProficiency in frontend testing, performance profiling, and accessibility best practicesUnderstanding of secure UI patterns (SSO/OAuth2, RBAC, multi-tenant UI isolation)Preferred QualificationsExperience building low-code/no-code interfaces for AI or developer platformsFamiliarity with LangSmith and agent observability tooling integration in UI workflowsExposure to conversational UI/UX design for chat and voice assistantsPrior experience with real-time collaborative editing (CRDTs, Yjs, or similar frameworks)Startup or early-stage product development experience in AI-driven SaaS environmentsAdditional InformationThe annual base salary range for this position is $238,000 - $342,000. We believe powerful tools don’t have to come with a steep learning curve and that great design is the bridge between complexity and clarity.Freshservice is a modern, intuitive AI-powered ITSM platform from Freshworks, trusted by thousands of organizations globally. Recognized for ease of setup and simplicity at scale, we are doubling down on design as a strategic differentiator, especially as we deepen our footprint with large, sophisticated enterprises.If you’re someone who craves the challenge of transforming complexity into elegant, user-centered solutions, and you believe enterprise users deserve the same quality of experience as consumers, this is the role for you.About the RoleWe are looking for an exceptional Principal Product Designer to lead strategic ideation and cross-functional alignment for the seamless, intuitive experiences that AI drives across the Freshworks portfolio. apiJob.title: Associate Manager, Brand Marketing
apiJob.description: Back to jobsNewAssociate Manager, Brand MarketingBengaluruApplyRazorpay is one of India’s leading full-stack financial technology companies, powering the way businesses move, manage, and grow money. Founded in 2014 by Harshil Mathur and Shashank Kumar with a simple vision — to simplify payments for Indian businesses — we’ve since grown into a fintech powerhouse driving India’s digital payment revolution. With strong roots in India and growing operations in Southeast Asia, we are shaping the next chapter of financial technology across the region. We are backed by global investors including GIC, Peak XV Partners (formerly Sequoia Capital India & SEA), Tiger Global, Ribbit Capital, Matrix Partners, MasterCard, and Salesforce Ventures, having raised over $740 million to date. Strategic acquisitions — including Ezetap (POS and offline payments), Curlec (Malaysia expansion), BillMe (digital invoicing), and POP (rewards-first UPI) — along with earlier moves in fraud prevention, payroll, and lending, have further strengthened our platform and widened our footprint across Asia. But what truly sets Razorpay apart is our culture. At Razorpay, ownership is our oxygen — you own what you build, with no micromanagement or red tape, just the runway to make your ideas fly. Learning is a lifestyle — if you’re curious, you’ll feel at home here. People > Pedigree — we hire for attitude, hustle, and hunger more than degrees. Transparency thrives over titles — this is where interns question CXOs and CXOs say “thank you.” Guided by our values of Customer First, Autonomy & Ownership, Agility with Integrity, Transparency, Challenging the status quo and a strong belief that Razorpay grows with Razors, you’ll be part of a 3000+ strong team building not just products, but the financial infrastructure of the future. The Role: You are someone who believes that good design has a role in the solution to every problem. You know that design is not just how things look and feel, but also how every process evolves. Even mundane processes from daily life can be made easier with design. You love products and have great creative skills. You want to own and be responsible for designing and driving products to completion. You religiously follow Buxton’s rule of producing at least 3 alternatives for every design decision. You respect the grid and hate all the half pixel aligned icons. Roles and Responsibilities : As a Product Designer you will: Take part in product and design ideation, planning and prioritization of our diverse range of products and features. Drive user research, create detailed user journeys and take appropriate design decisions backed by user-behavior and data. Define design strategies by analyzing data models and derive best practices within the team. Work closely with cross-disciplinary teams including Product, Engineering, Marketing and various Business teams to deliver delightful customer experiences. Strategize, develop, and extend the visual design systems and pattern libraries by coming up with new and innovative solutions which suit the Razorpay brand. Take part in creative and holistic thinking across our diverse products and conduct design reviews and status meetings as needed. Evangelize design within and outside the organization. Brainstorm and create new directions that Razorpay can take in our quest to make payments easy and accessible to all. Effectively mentor and inspire a team of designers. Help the team in raising the bar, resolving blockers, prioritizing and breaking down complex projects into simpler tasks. Mandatory Qualifications: As a Product Designer II, we expect you to have : 2+ years of experience in designing digital products. Ability to understand short and long-term goals of the product and business. Keen in applying user research, user-needs validation and usability evaluation. Excellent understanding of user-centered design and visual design principles. You understand the importance of behavioral analytics and you go by data-driven decisioning, when needed. A good understanding of Frontend principles to guide the team from an engineering point of view. Excellent communication and presentation skills and the ability to clearly articulate design decisions to the team and leadership. Razorpay believes in and follows an equal employment opportunity policy that doesn't discriminate on gender, religion, sexual orientation, colour, nationality, age, etc. We welcome interests and applications from all groups and communities across the globe. Follow us on LinkedIn & Twitter
